Warwick Castle are now casting for Halloween Actors & Performers to join the team at the UK's most thrilling Castle, bringing our spooktacular Halloween shows to life for our guests!🎃

items.text:
Paid Casting Call for Dating Show

We’re casting for a test filming of a new social dating show taking place in Central London.

Filming will take place in the evening for roughly 6 hours. Participants will receive £100 payment. 

We’re looking for genuine people, comfortable on camera and open to participating in a fun, interactive dating format. 

This is a great opportunity to be part of an early-stage concept and help us shape the future of it.

If you’re interested, please send a message or comment below and we’ll be in touch with more details.

topComments.text: I'm interested and very single
Interested

items.text:
Hey everyone! I don't know where to start but my daughter wants to get into modeling / acting/ photography!
She is 9 💓

Hey everyone! I don't know where to start but my daughter wants to get into modeling / acting/ photography!

topComments.text: Where are you from? I'm an agent.

She's adorable. Georgia is a great market to start in. Bizparentz Foundation has a free website with lots of "how to get started" info. There are hundreds of pages, but you'll watn to start with: 

Getting Started:  https://www.bizparentz.org/new-to-the-biz/

Avoiding Scams -- there are more than a few operating in Georgia, especially in the acting school space. Never pay for representation (agents and managers) and be very careful to check out the acting classes you take. https://www.bizparentz.org/new-to-the-biz/safety-and-scams/

Georgia laws -- you'll need a work permit -- and California laws since much of the stuff that shoots in Georgia is based in California studios. That means they require California work permits and Coogan accounts:   https://www.bizparentz.org/child-entertainment-laws-by-state/

How to Get and Agent/Manager: https://www.bizparentz.org/how-to-get-an-agent-or-manager-for-a-child-actor/

Welcome to the biz and here's some pixie dust for luck! 

Anne (Co-Founder of BizParentz Foundation)

🎬 Online Screen Acting Classes (Ages 14–18) - September 2026

Looking for a screen acting class?

Our Monday evening online classes (via Google Meet) are kept to just 6 students, giving everyone plenty of on-camera time, personalised coaching, and individual feedback.

Students develop:
✨ Self-tape & audition skills
🎭 Scene work & character development
💬 Improvisation
🎬 Screen acting techniques & industry knowledge

Perfect for beginners, theatre performers moving to screen, or young actors wanting to build confidence and gain professional skills.

📩 Email us for more information or to book a place – spaces are limited!

classes@mcaa.co.uk

https://cherrypipsacting.co.uk/

🎬 CASTING CALL – FEATURE FILM

Child Supporting Artist

We are looking for a boy aged 6–8 years for an upcoming feature film.

Requirements
• White Caucasian
• Dark hair (to match the older version of the character)
• Able to perform a handstand and/or cartwheel
• Must be local to the Christchurch/Bournemouth area

Dates
📍 Costume Fitting: 29th July – Shepperton Studios
🎥 Filming: 1st August – Christchurch/Bournemouth area

⏰ URGENT – Applications close TODAY at 1:30pm Tuesday 21st July 

If your child fits the brief and is available on the above dates, please email a recent headshot to info@sallykingagency.com with your child’s name, age, location and contact details.

We look forward to hearing from you.

#castingcall #childactor #bornmouth #christchurch #Pool #Dorset #casting #film #TV  #filming #deadline

*** 𝐀𝐔𝐃𝐈𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍 𝐃𝐀𝐓𝐄𝐒 𝐀𝐑𝐄 𝐀𝐕𝐀𝐈𝐋𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 ***

𝐌𝐚𝐫𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐀𝐜𝐚𝐝𝐞𝐦𝐲, located in Swinton, Manchester, is proud to be a Spotlight-accredited drama school that has achieved multiple awards for ‘𝐁𝐞𝐬𝐭 𝐃𝐫𝐚𝐦𝐚 𝐒𝐜𝐡𝐨𝐨𝐥 𝐎𝐟 𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐘𝐞𝐚𝐫’ for two consecutive years.
At Marble, we are dedicated to nurturing the talents of our students and strive relentlessly to ensure they reach their fullest potential in their dramatic careers. Our commitment to excellence sets us apart and empowers our students to shine on stage and beyond.

 

𝐖𝐞 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐢𝐬𝐞 𝐭𝐨 𝐢𝐦𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐯𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐭𝐚𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐚𝐥𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐝𝐲 𝐡𝐚𝐯𝐞.

 

Unlock your true potential with us as we guide you in shedding the bad habits that can hinder your growth as an actor. Our tailored modules encompass everything essential for a thriving career in TV, Film, and Theatre, from Audition Preparation to Script Analysis. Whether you’re starting your journey or eager to sharpen your skills, Marble Academy is the place to transform “𝐈 𝐥𝐨𝐯𝐞 𝐭𝐨 𝐚𝐜𝐭” into “𝐈'𝐦 𝐛𝐮𝐢𝐥𝐝𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚 𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐥 𝐜𝐚𝐫𝐞𝐞𝐫.”

 

Your instructor, Christian Le Feuvre, is a L.A.M.D.A. qualified actor and an award-winning filmmaker. If this resonates with you, visit our website to explore comprehensive information and inspiring student testimonials. 

www.marbleacademy.co.uk 

 

We can’t wait to hear from you!

 

𝐃𝐎𝐍’𝐓 𝐁𝐄 𝐀𝐍 𝐀𝐂𝐓𝐎𝐑 𝐁𝐄𝐂𝐀𝐔𝐒𝐄 𝐘𝐎𝐔 𝐖𝐀𝐍𝐓 𝐓𝐎; 𝐁𝐄 𝐀𝐍 𝐀𝐂𝐓𝐎𝐑 𝐁𝐄𝐂𝐀𝐔𝐒𝐄 𝐘𝐎𝐔 *𝐇𝐀𝐕𝐄* 𝐓𝐎!

🎄 EARLY CHRISTMAS ELF CASTING – 2026 GROTTO CONTRACT 🎄
We're casting early (but necessarily!) for our magical Christmas Grottos across the UK – and we’re on the lookout for charismatic, professional Christmas Elves to join the team!

📆 Contract: November – December 2026

💸 Rate: Varies per venue, TBC via email 

📍 Locations: 

* Woburn Sands – Milton Keynes

* Willington – Bedfordshire

* East Bridgford – Nottinghamshire

* Worlds End – Aylesbury 

* Newbridge – Horsham

✨ Requirements:

• Entry-level acting skills

• Basic script work and immersive performance ability

• Confident group singing of children’s Christmas songs

🧝‍♀️ We’re looking for:

• Confident, energetic performers with great improvisation skills

• Friendly, reliable team players

• Previous experience working with children or in character-based roles is a plus

📌 Important Info:

• Costume and full training provided

• Paid rehearsals and site visits will be scheduled in early November – exact dates TBC

• Below is the confirmed list of working dates and shift times:

( Please note these are the most shifts available at one venue, shifts WILL vary per different venue)

items.text:
Greetings,

i am Dmytro Vovk – an actor, director, and teacher from Ukraine 🇺🇦

I invite you to group online theater meetings based on my own author’s program.

🌍 I performed in Poland, Vietnam, USA, and Belgium.

🎓 Has a master’s degree and 6 years of teaching experience.

🏆 Winner and Grand Prix of Ukrainian and international street art festivals in 2016.

🎬 Created 3 short performance films without words, one of which was shown at the Tai Po Art Center in Hong Kong and dedicated to life in Ukraine.

💻 Online and group because we will concentrating on reading classical, old and modern plays of various genres, but mostly comedy 😄(dont worry about rights for modern plays, it possible use some fragments to practice). 

And of course, we cant be without exercises to relax the clamps in the body, the body language that we always use in life and basic techniques, methods of etudes to understand how to clearly convey thoughts. 

🎭 For whom

✨ Who wants to develop in theatrical art, communicate without words with partners, master the techniques of pair play, modern methods and techniques of self-expression, free from tension, integration of skills into work and life.

🌟 What will be in the classes

🔹 exercises to release physical and psychological tension and develop concentration;

🔹 breathing and voice exercises to release tension;

🔹 healthy, proper breathing techniques, breath support and distribution throughout the text, using the full capacity of the lungs, overcoming voice trembling, and creative exercises;

🔹 reading excerpts from classical and modern plays to develop emotional freedom in the voice, practice different characters, gestures, and facial expressions.

First trial meeting 30th July, for 10$ i will show the program exercises, plays, you could ask your questions, proposals and start. 

Registration necessarily - 

https://forms.gle/NTzM2EG998v4vem49 

🎭 In general, I called my view on development“Physical existence and play on stage” includes methods of theater/London physical theater, pantomime, circus and dance/buto (Japanese form of dance theater). The techniques combine non-verbal communication, physical expressiveness, sound, attention, gaze and body language.

🙏 Join! It is a group of two people or we will form new groups with a presentation and selection of plays and other play texts.

🎓 I’m with experience studying with:

✨ Lana Biba (student of Marcel Marceau) ✨ Marec Kostulek (Grotowski method) ✨ dance techniques of the finalists of “So You Think You Can Dance in Ukraine?” ✨ Franko Dragone (director of Cirque du Soleil) 🎪

✨ Who wants to develop in theatrical art, communicate without words with partners, master the techniques of pair play, modern methods and techniques of self-expression, free from tension, integration of skills into work and life.

🌟 What will be in the classes

🔹 exercises to release physical and psychological tension and develop concentration;

🔹 breathing and voice exercises to release tension;

🔹 healthy, proper breathing techniques, breath support and distribution throughout the text, using the full capacity of the lungs, overcoming voice trembling, and creative exercises;

🔹 reading excerpts from classical and modern plays to develop emotional freedom in the voice, practice different characters, gestures, and facial expressions.

First trial meeting 30th July, for 10$ i will show the program exercises, plays, you could ask your questions, proposals and start. 

Registration necessarily - 

https://forms.gle/NTzM2EG998v4vem49 

🎭 In general, I called my view on development“Physical existence and play on stage” includes methods of theater/London physical theater, pantomime, circus and dance/buto (Japanese form of dance theater). The techniques combine non-verbal communication, physical expressiveness, sound, attention, gaze and body language.

🙏 Join! It is a group of two people or we will form new groups with a presentation and selection of plays and other play texts.

🎓 I’m with experience studying with:

✨ Lana Biba (student of Marcel Marceau) ✨ Marec Kostulek (Grotowski method) ✨ dance techniques of the finalists of “So You Think You Can Dance in Ukraine?” ✨ Franko Dragone (director of Cirque du Soleil) 🎪

Zapewniamy transport z Warszawy.

items.text:
Norwegian Cruise Line Coast-to-Coast Dancer Audition Tour!

**NCL is holding open call auditions in San Diego, Albuquerque, Dallas, St. Louis, Detroit, Hershey, and Williamsburg for dancers. Please visit the link below for locations and dates.**

[https://nclhcreativestudios.com/auditions.html](https://nclhcreativestudios.com/auditions.html)

Please be prepared to learn multiple dance combinations and bring a hard copy of your current headshot and resume. Female identifying dancers, please bring dance heels and dance flats. Male identifying dancers, please bring sneakers/trainers and a flat jazz shoe.

Seeking dancers for mainstage productions onboard the Norwegian Getaway including Bring Back the 90s, which blends exuberant dance, powerhouse vocals, and stunning multimedia design to deliver an immersive ‘90s theatrical experience like no other. From the iconic fashion and irreverent pop culture to the music, fads, and unforgettable moments that defined a generation, this show takes the audience on a whirlwind journey through everything that made the ‘90s unforgettable.

**CONTRACT DETAILS**

Rehearsals begin November 9, 2026
Board the Norwegian Getaway on or about December 9, 2026
End of contract TBD 6-8 months onboard
Itinerary: Caribbean
***All dates subject to change.***

DANCERS: $800/week onboard, $560/week rehearsals

In addition to mainstage performances, cast members will also participate in and/or cover for other various entertainment offerings such as parties and pop-up events. All cast members are provided with a single occupancy cabin onboard, including Dancers. Cast will be Crew Members onboard with no cruise staff duties outside of the performance schedule.

***Dancers who audition will also be considered for all upcoming opportunities on Norwegian Cruise Line, Oceania Cruises, and Regent Seven Seas Cruises in addition to the Norwegian Getaway.*

**Must be 18 years or older to apply.**

**SEEKING DANCERS**

Female-Identifying Dancers 5’2 – 5'9
Male-Identifying Dancers 5’8 - 6’3
ALL ETHNICITIES

Strong, athletic dancers who showcase technique and finesse while moving from style to style. Major training emphasis in commercial jazz, ballet, contemporary, and hip-hop styles. Tap a plus! The ability to partner and lift or be lifted is a must. The ability to engage with an audience and tell a story is a must. Tumbling/acro a plus. Singing is not required.

Build the Trust. Wow the World.'

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – AGENT REID**

***Project Shadow***** (Student Film Trailer)**

**Manchester Youth Film School** is casting the role of **Agent Reid** for the upcoming teaser trailer **Project Shadow**.

**Please note:** This is a **volunteer, unpaid role** as part of a **student summer camp film project**. The trailer is being produced to give young filmmakers hands-on experience working on a professional-style production.

**Role**

**Agent Reid**
* Male or Female
* Playing age: **30–45**
* Calm, capable and authoritative.
* A skilled operative working for Project Shadow who secretly helps the children escape.
* A physically active role involving running and light choreographed action.

**Filming Date**

**Monday 28th July or Tuesday 29th July** *(one of these dates – exact day to be confirmed).*

**Time**

Approximately **2–3 hours of filming**, scheduled between **11:00 am and 3:00 pm**.

**Location**

**Gatley Village, Stockport** *(exact filming location will be provided upon casting).*

**About the Role**

Agent Reid is one of the organisation's operatives but begins to question their mission. In the trailer, Reid removes a child's tracking chip, helps the group escape the facility and stays behind to hold off the pursuing agents, allowing the children a chance to get away.

**Dialogue**

A small amount of dialogue, including the line:

"You're not getting out of here with those chips still inside you."

**Production**

**Project Shadow** is a cinematic action/thriller trailer produced by **Manchester Youth Film School** as part of its Summer Film Camp.

If you're interested, please send:
* A recent headshot
* Your availability for **28th and/or 29th July**

The trailer being produced give young filmmakers hands-on experience working on a professional-style production.'

items.text:
Casting Feature Film:  **HANDS WHICH SHED INNOCENT BLOOD**:

Shooting in Los Angeles - Oct./Nov. 2026   Must work Local

NON-UNION - Non-Paid — Copy; Credit; Meals

Please email resume, with updated pic; height; age range; link to reel please.

Ridgley.james@gmail.com

If selected - 1st Self-tape with sides

2nd - Live auditions.

Thank you SOOOO MUCHHHHHH!!!

**EMILY ROTH** — Female, 22. A classically trained violinist with a voluptuous figure and homely face, arriving in LA from the Midwest. Naive, awkward, and endearingly flustered in social situations — prone to word-fumbling and self-deprecating humor. Beneath that vulnerability lives cold, calculating menace and a buried rage that can surface without warning. Must play comic vulnerability and genuine danger with equal conviction. Violin performance skills a plus.

**PETER** — Male, 27. Wiry, quirky-cute, and nerdish. A self-contained, tech-savvy loner with a warm romantic side and a quietly dangerous undercurrent. Socially awkward but deeply perceptive, with a fiercely protective streak. Must balance genuine sweetness with controlled menace.

**XAVIER** — Male, 30s. Soap-star handsome with a charming surface and a cold, cunning interior. Carries an easy sneer and turns intimidating quickly. Fundamentally a predator dressed as a landlord.

**CHLOE** — Female, 30s. Blonde, outwardly ditzy and warm, but shrewd and calculating underneath. Can shift from sisterly to threatening in an instant. Sharp comic timing essential.

**AIDEN** — Male, late 20s–30s. Jim Morrison looks — magnetic, loud, crude, and self-destructive. Sexually aggressive with rare flashes of genuine feeling. Rockstar energy required.

**JASMINE** — Female (trans). Warm, plainspoken, and grounded — the moral compass of the piece. Genuine dignity and emotional intelligence are essential to the role.

**DETECTIVE ROBBINS** — Male, late 40s–mid 50s. Heavyset and grizzled. A no-nonsense, straight-talking cop with a cigarette perpetually on his lip. Dogged and suspicious, with occasional flashes of empathy.

**GORDON ROTH** — Male, 50s. Nick Nolte type — sandy-haired, weathered, and beaten. Fiercely loving toward his daughter; cold and dangerous to everyone else.

**VINCE DEMATTO** — Male, 30s. Slick and well-dressed. Predatory under a smooth, confident charm. Featured role.

**STEVE HANSEN** — Male, mid-30s. Clean-cut and polished — more Harvard lawyer than creative. Charismatic and manipulative. Featured role.

**DETECTIVE HERNANDEZ** — Any gender, age open. Professional and steady. Small recurring supporting role.

Ważne: Ręce podobne patrz referencje ! 
Kolor skóry - nie bardzo blade, 
Za manicure nie płacisz !

ZLECENIA@ATLANTAFILMS.pl

items.text:
Poszukujemy charyzmatycznych osobowości do nowego internetowego projektu o tematyce około motoryzacyjnej. Jeśli motoryzacja to Twoje środowisko i masz wyrazisty charakter — zgłoś się. Szukamy m.in. stereotypowego kierowcy BMW, spokojnego kierowcy, taksówkarza, byłego policjanta, byłego albo czynnego kierowcy zawodowego oraz innych osób z mocnymi poglądami na kulturę jazdy. Doświadczenie telewizyjne nie jest wymagane- liczy się autentyczność, osobowość i swoboda przed kamerą.

1. Zdjęcia w Warszawie.

2. Zdjęcia planowane są pod koniec sierpnia albo we wrześniu 2026. Dokładne daty do ustalenia.

3. Wynagrodzenie: 500 zł netto za 1 dzień zdjęciowy i prawa.

W razie zainteresowania, spełnienia wymagań, prosimy o wysłanie zgłoszenia, podając następujące informację:

1. Imię i nazwisko

2. Rok urodzenia

3. Miasto zamieszkania

4. Telefon kontaktowy

5. Adres e-mail

6. Wzrost

7. Link do profilu na Facebooku

8. Opisz kilka zdań o sobie oraz krótkie nagranie wideo (wizytówka).

9. Minimum trzy zdjęcia

Kontakt: rekrutacja@agencjainfernal.pl

W temacie wiadomości prosimy napisać: Nowy projekt motoryzacyjny

Wysłanie zgłoszenie jest jednoznaczne z wyrażeniem zgody na przetwarzanie danych osobowych w celu udziału w nowym projekcie internetowym zgodnie z Rozporządzeniem Parlamentu Europejskiego i Rady (UE) 2016/679 z dnia 27 kwietnia 2016 r. w sprawie ochrony osób fizycznych w związku z przetwarzaniem danych osobowych i w sprawie swobodnego przepływu takich danych oraz uchylenia dyrektywy 95/46/WE (ogólne rozporządzenie o ochronie danych). Administratorem Twoich danych osobowych pozyskanych w procesie rekrutacyjnym jest Agencja Artystyczna INFERNAL. Podanie danych jest dobrowolne, w każdej chwili przysługuje Ci prawo do wglądu do danych, ich poprawiania lub usunięcia. Kontakt do administratora rekrutacja@agencjainfernal.pl.

**CASTING!**

Do projektu TikTok dla firmy bukmacherskiej poszukujemy mężczyzny w wieku **65–80 lat**

Szukamy osoby o charakterystycznej prezencji, inspirowanej klimatem **Tony’ego Soprano**

Wyobraź sobie mężczyznę, który dorobił się fortuny i dziś spokojnie, z klasą oraz rozmachem korzysta z życia na emeryturze. Charyzmatyczny, mądry, pewny siebie – ktoś, kto zna smak życia, pieniędzy i władzy. Prawdziwy włoski mafioso z charakterem

Projekt długoterminowy
Pierwszy blok zdjęć: początek–połowa sierpnia w Warszawie (2 dni zdjęciowe)

Może to właśnie Ty… albo Twój dziadek?

items.text:
Casting Call: Actors, Interactive Performers & Scare Technicians

Gallows Hill Museum & Theatre – Salem, Massachusetts / The Lost Museum Haunted Adventure

Paid Seasonal Positions
Fall Halloween Season

Gallows Hill Museum & Theatre, one of Salem’s premier Halloween attractions, is seeking talented, energetic, and dependable performers to join our cast for the upcoming fall season. We are casting for multiple short productions that blend theatrical storytelling, audience interaction, suspense, and practical effects.

Production 1: Main Stage Immersive Experience

We’re seeking versatile actors to perform in our signature immersive theatrical production about witches and ghosts.

This fast-paced 22 minute show features a single performer portraying multiple characters through rapid costume changes, dynamic storytelling, comedy, suspense, and the use of puppetry. Performers must be comfortable switching between distinct personalities while maintaining high energy throughout each performance.

Ideal candidates possess:

Strong acting and storytelling abilities
Excellent character work
Confidence performing for live audiences
Quick memorization skills
High energy
Some experience with improvisation

This role offers an exciting opportunity to showcase versatility in a truly unique theatrical experience.

Production 2: The Lost Museum

Step into the role of an eccentric museum guide as guests explore a collection of mysterious artifacts and strange curiosities…

…until everything begins to go spectacularly wrong.

Actors portraying museum guides lead guests through haunted rooms while balancing suspense, audience interaction, and improvisation. You’ll remain in character as supernatural events unfold around your tour group, creating an experience that is equal parts entertaining, immersive, and delightfully chaotic. 

When not leading tours, performers will also work as Scare Technicians, operating puppets, ghosts, practical effects, lighting cues, hidden scares, and other theatrical illusions that make the attraction come alive.

We’re seeking performers who are:

Passionate about theatre, Halloween, and immersive entertainment
Strong communicators comfortable speaking to groups
Excellent improvisers who can think on their feet
Reliable, punctual, and professional
Team players with positive attitudes
Comfortable interacting with audiences of all ages
Interested in learning backstage theatrical effects and puppet operation
Day, evening and weekend shifts are available.

Previous experience in theatre, haunted attractions, improv, museums, escape rooms, theme parks, or live entertainment is welcomed but not required. We are happy to train enthusiastic individuals with a strong work ethic and a willingness to learn.

Please submit:

Headshot (professional or recent clear photo)
Resume (if available)
A brief introduction telling us about yourself and why you’d like to join our cast
Demo reel (optional)
Video submission is also acceptable

 Email: gallowshillsalem@outlook.com for an audition appointment.

sharedPost.text:
ATL CASTING NOTICE - vertical drama series by the upcoming platform founded by Elayne Fluker, WatchAnnaBelle. 

WatchAnnaBelle is a new microdrama streaming platform centering Black women’s stories. Their first original series, directed by yours truly, films in Atlanta the week of August 17th. 

“Gonna take a Miracle” is casting eight supporting roles. Check out the slides to meet the characters and click the link to submit!

items.text:
**CASTING CALL FOR INDIE SHORT FILM**

**TITLE: Concrete & County Line **

**LOGLINE: **A 1920’s noir film circling around the murder of a sheriff in Texas that leads his partner up northeast to the big city to chase the killer and get some help from a local detective.

**ROLES:**

**DETECTIVE MAX MONAHUE:( **Male, 40’s- 60’s) A drunkard 1920’s detective whose been in the game far too long but continues more for his pride than anything. Must have a trans-atlantic accent.

**SHERIFF TANGEE: (**Male, 30’s) A southern cowboy that is stern and determined. He puts justice and fairness above all, even his own common sense. Stern, humble, and justified.

**BTS Needed:**

**Director of Photography**

**Gaffer**

**Sound Mixer**

**AUDITION INFORMATION: **Email tyler.j.stewart14@gmail.com for what role you would like to audition for and we will send you a small script to use for your audition and email us back with the audition.

**COMPENSATION: **Unpaid. Food, film credit, free tickets to premiere events, and footage will be supplied.

**PRODUCTION TYPE: **Indie Short Film

**SHOOTING SCHEDULE: **8/16, Sunday 10am-4pm

**FILMING LOCATION: **Denver, CO

items.text:
Norwegian Cruise Line Coast-to-Coast Dancer Audition Tour!

**NCL is holding open call auditions in San Diego, Albuquerque, Dallas, St. Louis, Detroit, Hershey, and Williamsburg for dancers. Please visit the link below for locations and dates.**

[https://nclhcreativestudios.com/auditions.html](https://nclhcreativestudios.com/auditions.html)

Please be prepared to learn multiple dance combinations and bring a hard copy of your current headshot and resume. Female identifying dancers, please bring dance heels and dance flats. Male identifying dancers, please bring sneakers/trainers and a flat jazz shoe.

Seeking dancers for mainstage productions onboard the Norwegian Getaway including Bring Back the 90s, which blends exuberant dance, powerhouse vocals, and stunning multimedia design to deliver an immersive ‘90s theatrical experience like no other. From the iconic fashion and irreverent pop culture to the music, fads, and unforgettable moments that defined a generation, this show takes the audience on a whirlwind journey through everything that made the ‘90s unforgettable.

**CONTRACT DETAILS**

Rehearsals begin November 9, 2026
Board the Norwegian Getaway on or about December 9, 2026
End of contract TBD 6-8 months onboard
Itinerary: Caribbean
***All dates subject to change.***

DANCERS: $800/week onboard, $560/week rehearsals

In addition to mainstage performances, cast members will also participate in and/or cover for other various entertainment offerings such as parties and pop-up events. All cast members are provided with a single occupancy cabin onboard, including Dancers. Cast will be Crew Members onboard with no cruise staff duties outside of the performance schedule.

***Dancers who audition will also be considered for all upcoming opportunities on Norwegian Cruise Line, Oceania Cruises, and Regent Seven Seas Cruises in addition to the Norwegian Getaway.*

**Must be 18 years or older to apply.**

**SEEKING DANCERS**

Female-Identifying Dancers 5’2 – 5'9
Male-Identifying Dancers 5’8 - 6’3
ALL ETHNICITIES

Strong, athletic dancers who showcase technique and finesse while moving from style to style. Major training emphasis in commercial jazz, ballet, contemporary, and hip-hop styles. Tap a plus! The ability to partner and lift or be lifted is a must. The ability to engage with an audience and tell a story is a must. Tumbling/acro a plus. Singing is not required.

Build the Trust. Wow the World.'

You **can't audition for a lead the same way you audition for a one-liner.**

In this class, KC coaches an actor through **three completely different ways** to say one word:

**"Coffee?"**

Same line. Three different worlds. Three completely different auditions.

In the full free class, KC and Donna-Marie explain **why leads, principals and one-liners all require a different approach** - and how understanding that can completely change your auditions.

🎬 Click the link to watch the full class.

[https://youtu.be/ZieNqGYyu5k?si=n8oeb8eqsHBUHUPG](https://youtu.be/ZieNqGYyu5k?si=n8oeb8eqsHBUHUPG)

items.text:
Do you love analog horror, ’80s horror films, and internet horror? Then this project is for you.

Pig Man is an indie found footage horror short following a brutal killer stalking the streets of London.

Logline:
One man’s childhood hunger was never satisfied. His family… the pigs on their farm… were never enough. Now he craves more, and the streets of London have become his perfect hunting ground.

I’m currently in pre-production and looking to cast two female actors for the project, with plans to shoot within the next month.

Casting Call

I’m looking for two female actors to play club goers enjoying a night out in London before their evening takes a terrifying turn when they encounter Pig Man.

Previous acting experience is preferred but not essential — the most important thing is a passion for horror, storytelling, and collaborative indie filmmaking.

The project draws inspiration from analog horror, ’80s horror films, and internet horror, with a focus on creating an unsettling found footage experience. The roles will involve helping create a realistic portrayal of a normal night out before the story shifts into something much darker.

This is a true indie production with a small, collaborative team focused on creating an authentic found footage horror short.

This is an unpaid project ￼

What Cast Will Receive:

* Food and snacks provided during filming
* One provided meal during the shoot
* Footage for personal portfolios/showreels
* Full screen credits for their work on the project

The shoot will take place over one day and will ideally be around five hours long, either in the afternoon or evening.

If you’re interested in getting involved, please send me a message on Facebook Messenger with a little information about yourself, your acting experience, and any relevant work or showreels.

Pitch deck included in this post.

Looking forward to working with fellow creatives and creating something unique in the world of indie horror.

items.text:
Casting Call for a Permanent Main Cast Role:

Evangaline the Black Mage--Main Character Role-long term, Permanently Position.

Pay Rate:

I can offer £15 per hour starting from the first hour when we start filming and ending on the last hour when we have stop filming. Overtime payment is included.

Acting Description:

You'll be following my instructions during each Scene/Take as we film. Showing Body Language, Facial Expressions, and Fighting in a RPG gameplay style. You must have a good memory when saying your lines.

Filming Location(s): 

All over the City of Milton Keynes.

Sometimes outside of Milton Keynes if I can not find a good filming location within the area. And most times film locations need to be specific in the right film set.

How many days of Filming:

Minimal of 1 day per month. I try and do multiple days per month but it get's hard to arrange and organize a Film Date based around everyone's rota's.

Travel Payment:

Your Travel fee(s) will be covered by me coming and going from Milton Keynes but you will have to show some proof of your journey so I can give the right amount to cover your Travels.

Food and Drinks:

Food and Drinks will be provided by me, but I don't bring food and drinks since the Team has been ok bringing there own. If we are near a Local Shop, Café, Coffee Shop, or even a Fast Food Restaurant, ect. Just let me know what you like and I will pay for you.

Evangaline Character Description: 

Full Name: Evangaline Springbell

Age: 19

Class: Black Mage-(Elemental Spellcaster)

Weapon(s): Fans and Rods-(Maybe)

Character Appearance:

She wears a big Leather Brown Wizard Hat with a big Red Ribbon to the side of the Belt Buckle, a Neck Choker, and a smooth Summer Red and Black Tartan Dress with a thin small Black Jacket.

She has Black Leggings with Red and Black Socks on and her hair colour changes sometimes to match her emotions.

Her alternative clothes is a Red and Black Hell Bunny Dress. (DLC idea I have used in the past.)

Character Bio:

Evangaline is a skilful Black Mage who uses Black Magic Spells that are a variety of Elemental and Destructive Power.

She is strong-willed, courageous, and has a strong sense of determination to punish those who commit evil deeds on others with her Black Magic. Even if they are her allies and friends which makes her quite scary.

At times she losses' her cool and get's angry sometimes, losing her temper and casting a Fire Magic Spell on others, especially on Zorran who annoys her and sexualised her for being a good looking woman. Making her very fierce and those who cross her will pay with there life.

she is a bit tomboyish, imposing, sharp-tongued, and extremely blunt, always blurting what she truly thinks and feels like without reservation, even if said comments come at others' expense. She makes it a personal philosophy to always be honest as it feels better.

Relationships with other Main Characters:

(Renzu)---She has a very healthy friendship and respect to Renzu the Main Hero of the Story (Protagonist) after he helped her out for being framed for a crime she did not commit without judging her. Evangaline over time starts to development feelings towards him but still treats him like any other typical Boy as they are the same age and that Evangaline has never spent so much time with a Boy before.

(Zorran)---She doesn't like him all that much for being a drunken, lazy, childish, and perverted older man. When Zorran slaps her bum she sets his hand on fire with a fire magic spell which Zorran never learns from. Evangaline has to keep her guard up around him all the time as Zorran is unpredictable.

(Drako)--She feels Drako's pain after he lost his loved one to a Troll Monster, although Drako hasn't been part of the team for that long and she doe's not know him all too well but she enjoys his fighting spirit and resolve and get's along well with him 2nd to Renzu. Evangaline doe's not get why Drako likes Zorran that much or why his calling him "Master". She thinks he is a bit naïve.

What I'm looking for:

A Female Actress who is Capable, Committed, Not in full Education, Fit for the role, Flexible with her Rota, and is able to travel to Milton Keynes. And can travel to other locations outside Milton Keynes.

Age: 18-24

Height: 5.3 foot to 5.8 foot

Skin: White

Hair Colour: Any.

Body Type: Slim Build, Chubby, Athletic

Acting Requirements: Everybody is welcome, show me what you can do and what you know based on your Acting Experience.

Nationality: White British. Other White or British Nationality are welcome within reason.

I'm willing to let 1 or 2 slide if you don't meet the requirements, the rest will come down to a finale decision as I can't make any mistakes as this role is very important to be filled. If you don't think you can do this or can't handle it then best to step down from applying.

How to apply:

You can send a message to me directly. We can talk first, exchange information and contacts maybe, I will answer some questions that you wish to know or what I have missed in this Casting Call but not too many please as it saves time and I want to save my breath in answering questions and providing more info to those who are actually serious about this Post (No time wasters please).

After a few steps I'LL arrange a time and date to meet face to face with you if you live in or near Milton Keynes or by Video Call if you live far away like London. The chat will be about 1 hour and 30 mins.

If you are traveling to meet me in person your Travel Cost will be covered coming to Milton Keynes and going back home, which I will provide a fair sum for the time you have taken to see me on your journey.

Looking to continue filming with are new Actress as Evangaline starting August.

Thank you for taking the time to read this. — at Milton Keynes.

items.groupTitle: Casting Calls & Acting Auditions in London / UK
items.summary:
Casting Call for a Permanent Main Cast Role:

Evangaline the Black Mage--Main Character Role-long term, Permanently Position.

Pay Rate:

I can offer £15 per hour starting from the first hour when we start filming and ending on the last hour when we have stop filming. Overtime payment is included.

Acting Description:

You'll be following my instructions during each Scene/Take as we film. Showing Body Language, Facial Expressions, and Fighting in a RPG gameplay style. You must have a good memory when saying your lines.

Filming Location(s): 

All over the City of Milton Keynes.

Sometimes outside of Milton Keynes if I can not find a good filming location within the area. And most times film locations need to be specific in the right film set.

How many days of Filming:

Minimal of 1 day per month. I try and do multiple days per month but it get's hard to arrange and organize a Film Date based around everyone's rota's.

Travel Payment:

Your Travel fee(s) will be covered by me coming and going from Milton Keynes but you will have to show some proof of your journey so I can give the right amount to cover your Travels.

Food and Drinks:

Food and Drinks will be provided by me, but I don't bring food and drinks since the Team has been ok bringing there own. If we are near a Local Shop, Café, Coffee Shop, or even a Fast Food Restaurant, ect. Just let me know what you like and I will pay for you.

Evangaline Character Description: 

Full Name: Evangaline Springbell

Age: 19

Class: Black Mage-(Elemental Spellcaster)

Weapon(s): Fans and Rods-(Maybe)

Character Appearance:

She wears a big Leather Brown Wizard Hat with a big Red Ribbon to the side of the Belt Buckle, a Neck Choker, and a smooth Summer Red and Black Tartan Dress with a thin small Black Jacket.

She has Black Leggings with Red and Black Socks on and her hair colour changes sometimes to match her emotions.

Her alternative clothes is a Red and Black Hell Bunny Dress. (DLC idea I have used in the past.)

Character Bio:

Evangaline is a skilful Black Mage who uses Black Magic Spells that are a variety of Elemental and Destructive Power.

She is strong-willed, courageous, and has a strong sense of determination to punish those who commit evil deeds on others with her Black Magic. Even if they are her allies and friends which makes her quite scary.

At times she losses' her cool and get's angry sometimes, losing her temper and casting a Fire Magic Spell on others, especially on Zorran who annoys her and sexualised her for being a good looking woman. Making her very fierce and those who cross her will pay with there life.

she is a bit tomboyish, imposing, sharp-tongued, and extremely blunt, always blurting what she truly thinks and feels like without reservation, even if said comments come at others' expense. She makes it a personal philosophy to always be honest as it feels better.

Relationships with other Main Characters:

(Renzu)---She has a very healthy friendship and respect to Renzu the Main Hero of the Story (Protagonist) after he helped her out for being framed for a crime she did not commit without judging her. Evangaline over time starts to development feelings towards him but still treats him like any other typical Boy as they are the same age and that Evangaline has never spent so much time with a Boy before.

(Zorran)---She doesn't like him all that much for being a drunken, lazy, childish, and perverted older man. When Zorran slaps her bum she sets his hand on fire with a fire magic spell which Zorran never learns from. Evangaline has to keep her guard up around him all the time as Zorran is unpredictable.

(Drako)--She feels Drako's pain after he lost his loved one to a Troll Monster, although Drako hasn't been part of the team for that long and she doe's not know him all too well but she enjoys his fighting spirit and resolve and get's along well with him 2nd to Renzu. Evangaline doe's not get why Drako likes Zorran that much or why his calling him "Master". She thinks he is a bit naïve.

What I'm looking for:

A Female Actress who is Capable, Committed, Not in full Education, Fit for the role, Flexible with her Rota, and is able to travel to Milton Keynes. And can travel to other locations outside Milton Keynes.

Age: 18-24

Height: 5.3 foot to 5.8 foot

Skin: White

Hair Colour: Any.

Body Type: Slim Build, Chubby, Athletic

Acting Requirements: Everybody is welcome, show me what you can do and what you know based on your Acting Experience.

Nationality: White British. Other White or British Nationality are welcome within reason.

I'm willing to let 1 or 2 slide if you don't meet the requirements, the rest will come down to a finale decision as I can't make any mistakes as this role is very important to be filled. If you don't think you can do this or can't handle it then best to step down from applying.

How to apply:

You can send a message to me directly. We can talk first, exchange information and contacts maybe, I will answer some questions that you wish to know or what I have missed in this Casting Call but not too many please as it saves time and I want to save my breath in answering questions and providing more info to those who are actually serious about this Post (No time wasters please).

After a few steps I'LL arrange a time and date to meet face to face with you if you live in or near Milton Keynes or by Video Call if you live far away like London. The chat will be about 1 hour and 30 mins.

If you are traveling to meet me in person your Travel Cost will be covered coming to Milton Keynes and going back home, which I will provide a fair sum for the time you have taken to see me on your journey.

Looking to continue filming with are new Actress as Evangaline starting August.

Thank you for taking the time to read this. — at Milton Keynes.
items.title: Casting Call for a Permanent Main Cast Role:

items.text:
Hey guys - just doing a shout out for an open mic cabaret night in Dalston next Wednesday 29th July  @ Ridley Road Market Bar. 

We are welcoming more performers to join us and perform an act - it could be a song, spoken word, comedy or an extract of something you are working on? Are you going to Edinburgh this year? 

This is unpaid as we are fundraising towards taking our show to Edinburgh but there is no pressure to donate! We want it be a gathering of creatives and a chance for us all to share our work - an opportunity to network and a platform for you to perform.  

We also have a specific casting call:

We are looking for an actor of Jamaican/Carribean heritage who feels comfortable with the Patwa (Patois) dialect to be able to read a couple of Benjamin Zephaniah's poems at our event. 

We are really excited to be welcoming Qian Zephaniah to our event, who has endorsed our show 'Dear Cathy'. One of his poems is part of our show and central themes that he speaks of. You would also be welcome to perform anything else that you would like of course! This would be a really special part of the evening and we hope you can join us! 

Please comment below and/or DM me if you are interested and would like to know more. 

Thanks so much, DC team. xX

items.title: ARE YOU READY??

items.text:
Hey guys - just doing a shout out for an open mic cabaret night in Dalston next Wednesday 29th July  @ Ridley Road Market Bar. 

We are welcoming more performers to join us and perform an act - it could be a song, spoken word, comedy or an extract of something you are working on? Are you going to Edinburgh this year? 

This is unpaid as we are fundraising towards taking our show to Edinburgh but there is no pressure to donate! We want it be a gathering of creatives and a chance for us all to share our work - an opportunity to network and a platform for you to perform.  

We also have a specific casting call:

We are looking for an actor of Jamaican/Carribean heritage who feels comfortable with the Patwa (Patois) dialect to be able to read a couple of Benjamin Zephaniah's poems at our event. 

We are really excited to be welcoming Qian Zephaniah to our event, who has endorsed our show 'Dear Cathy'. One of his poems is part of our show and central themes that he speaks of. You would also be welcome to perform anything else that you would like of course! 

This would be a really special part of the evening and we hope you can join us! 

Please comment below and/or DM me if you are interested and would like to know more.

Thanks so much, DC team. xX

This is unpaid as we are fundraising towards taking our show to Edinburgh but there is no pressure to donate! We want it be a gathering of creatives and a chance for us all to share our work - an opportunity to network and a platform for you to perform.  

We also have a specific casting call:

We are looking for an actor of Jamaican/Carribean heritage who feels comfortable with the Patwa (Patois) dialect to be able to read a couple of Benjamin Zephaniah's poems at our event.

items.text:
We are now casting  for our touring   Autumn show Viva Las Vegas .

The show is a musical  show featuring songs  of Sinatra, Judy Garland , Fred Astaire And Ginger Rogers  as well; as songs from Top Hat,  Easter Parade, The Wizard Of Oz  and more.

We are looking for an experienced hardworking M/F  performer who are keen to take quality musical shows to the community  based   venues .

The show is a one man/woman show so we are looking for experienced performers that can hold an audience and are looking for engaging vocalist performers.

Rehearsals- 24th -28th August  

Playing Dates- 31st  August  -30th October touring  Midlands and Northwest 

We work Monday to Friday (2 x 60 minute shows per day)

Casting Breakdown

We are offering 700 to 750 per week plus fuel on the road as well as accommodation allowance  if needed on the road

Please send details including a singing reel to info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk

items.text:
**Casting Call - Halesowen Based** **Actor**

**Project Type: University short film / Experimental Drama**

My crew are looking for a male actor, aged 18-25 to be in our short film, shooting on Monday the 27th the Birmingham/Halesowen area. To take place in student accommodation / one of our homes, it is an unpaid role but meals and refreshments will be provided on set, short notice as have had talent drop out, would really appreciate the help

**Logline - **After an exhausting shift at a local bar, an introverted young bartender is relentlessly tormented by an articulate projection of himself whilst at home and walking through the streets of his town, forcing a confrontation over identity, cowardice, and unresolved expectations.

**Role - **Edward/Eddie - The aforementioned bartender and his alternate counterpart. The actor will physically play Edward on screen and perform the voiceover for Eddie, strong vocal control and delivery are preferred, with the ability to contrast the fragile Edward with a sharp cadence for Eddie.

Non-male talent are also welcome to audition, characters are not set in stone

Please message me directly to apply or just for more information on the role and shooting schedule.

topComments.text: Yes
Yes

items.text: Casting from self tapes for roles in South Wales.

sharedPost.text:
Great to see the self tapes coming in from those interested in our next feature, after the success of our last one winning best feature at the London International Film Festival we're making another!

The filming is commencing soon and the first scenes will be shot at the Tredegar Arms in Rogerstone Newport South Wales.

Awaiting on the list of the few characters written into the script one is for a male or female interviewer which is a major role and will be a few days on set, the others possibly just a few hours.

There could be other roles so send a self tape telling us a bit about yourself what you're done and why you'd like a role in our next movie.

Made by actors for actors so will be unpaid but will be a great addition to any actors profile.

Click link for the self tape script for interviewer and wife facebook.com/share/p/1EaPJNKqUC/

Weekly Wins!

Come on then, what’s been your little victory this week? 🎬

Maybe you landed an audition, nailed a self-tape, finally updated your headshots, or just made it through Monday without swearing at the universe.

Big or small, every win counts, drop yours in the comments and let’s give each other a bit of well earned applause. 👏🎬🇬🇧

topComments.text: Self tape 3 this month for decent TVC. Maybe 3rd time lucky! Landed my first social advert last month, which was a good start. 🤞🤞🤞
Had a great day filming on Tuesday with the crew from Fulfilment Pictures on their latest project

items.text:
🎭 CASTING CALL — COSMIC HORROR SHORT 🎭

We're extremely excited to be casting our upcoming cosmic horror proof-of-concept short, RIFT — and we're searching for the right performers to bring this haunting story to life. 👁️

Logline: A grieving artist tries sketching her late wife's memory and instead opens herself to a trapped child's spirit, luring her toward a hole into darkness that may cost her soul.

We're seeking:

DAWN | Lead | 30s | Female

A grief-stricken artist and psychic sensitive.

MYRA | Lead (Supernatural) | 30s | Female

Dawn's deceased wife — calm, tender.

SERENA | Supporting (feature potential) | 50s | Female

Dawn's mentor and guide in psychic practice — elegant and composed.

THE CHILD | Supporting (Non-verbal) | 18+ (playing 10) | Female

A silent, uncanny spirit-child who lures Dawn. (Adult actor portraying a younger character.)

The details:

📍 Location: Burnaby, BC

📅 Shoot Dates: August 5 & 6

💰 Volunteer / deferred payment positions

🍽️ Hot meals, credit, and footage for your reel provided

We genuinely appreciate anyone interested in collaborating and helping us tell this story. 🖤

To audition: Email your headshot, reel, and resume (if available) to cosmeumproductions@gmail.com with your requested role in the subject line.

#CastingCall #IndieFilm #CosmicHorror #HorrorShort #Actors #VancouverActors #BurnabyBC #Filmmaking #IndieHorror #ProofOfConcept #NowCasting

items.text: Looking to get my daughter with a casting agency. She is interested in print and film. We’ve gotten some requests for self-tapes independently, but am hoping to find some who has a wider net!

topComments.text: Get her into an acting class. Unless she’s going to be print only, she’ll need a class on how to act for the camera. Then when she has some experience, maybe a few projects under her belt, you can submit to agencies for representation.
Look for her and talent agency in new work. Agency usually have acting classes. Network as much as possible with other moms in that area as well.

items.text:
**KRAKÓW - ŚPIEWAJĄCY AKTORZY POSZUKIWANI - ZLECENIE DOBRZE PŁATNE - NOWA DATA **

**Wszystkie osoby, które już wysłały mi swoje zgłoszenie i są dostępne w nowym terminie - uprzejmie proszę o podbicie mi maila i potwierdzenie dostępności!**

Do spotu reklamowego dla producenta słodyczy poszukuję:

**- 2 kobiety młodsze (35-45 lat) // do 2 scen**

aktorki/ grający naturszczycy z doświadczeniem, naturalne, ciepła energia, nie idealnie piękne / modelowe, spontaniczne, możliwe podobieństwo fizyczne (siostry / kuzynki)

- **mężczyzna (45-55 lat) // do 1 sceny**

aktor/ grający naturszczyk z doświadczeniem, naturalny i autentyczny, nie idealnie piękny / modelowy. Figura - lekko „zasiedziany home office”

- **dzieci:** **dziewczynka (około 7 lat) i chłopiec (około 10 lat) //** **do 1 sceny **

grające - z doświadczeniem przed kamerą, naturalne, autentyczne, radosne i żywiołowe, potrafiące amatorsko tańczyć, możliwe podobieństwo fizyczne (rodzeństwo / kuzyni)

- **3 kobiety starsze (około 50 lat) //** **do 1 sceny **

aktorki/ grający naturszczycy z doświadczeniem, naturalne i autentyczne, bardzo pozytywne, nieskrępowane, żywiołowe, wyraźnie różniące się typem figury i urody, nie idealnie piękne / modelowe

- **babcia (około 70 lat) //** **do 1 sceny **

aktorki/ grający naturszczycy z doświadczeniem, miejska fajna babcia, z luzem i naturalnością, otwarta i z auto dystansem 

**Wymagana umiejętność u wszystkich – śpiew aktorski / dobry śpiew amatorski i doświadczenie przed kamerą!**

Role epizodyczne nie mówione ale śpiewane, na dalszym etapie castingu wybrane osoby poproszę o nagranie wskazanej piosenki. 

**Prawa na 5 lat bez ograniczeń terytorialnych, pola eksploatacji TV, internet, kino, radio, outdoor, POS. **

**Zdjęcia 10 sierpnia 2026 w Krakowie (okolicach)**. 

Nie zapewniamy noclegu, ewentualnie zwrot kosztów dojazdu (paliwa, bilety na pociąg).

items.summary:
**KRAKÓW - ŚPIEWAJĄCY AKTORZY POSZUKIWANI - ZLECENIE DOBRZE PŁATNE - NOWA DATA **

**Wszystkie osoby, które już wysłały mi swoje zgłoszenie i są dostępne w nowym terminie - uprzejmie proszę o podbicie mi maila i potwierdzenie dostępności!**

Do spotu reklamowego dla producenta słodyczy poszukuję:

**- 2 kobiety młodsze (35-45 lat) // do 2 scen**

aktorki/ grający naturszczycy z doświadczeniem, naturalne, ciepła energia, nie idealnie piękne / modelowe, spontaniczne, możliwe podobieństwo fizyczne (siostry / kuzynki)

- **mężczyzna (45-55 lat) // do 1 sceny**

aktor/ grający naturszczyk z doświadczeniem, naturalny i autentyczny, nie idealnie piękny / modelowy. Figura - lekko „zasiedziany home office”

- **dzieci:** **dziewczynka (około 7 lat) i chłopiec (około 10 lat) //** **do 1 sceny **

grające - z doświadczeniem przed kamerą, naturalne, autentyczne, radosne i żywiołowe, potrafiące amatorsko tańczyć, możliwe podobieństwo fizyczne (rodzeństwo / kuzyni)

- **3 kobiety starsze (około 50 lat) //** **do 1 sceny **

aktorki/ grający naturszczycy z doświadczeniem, naturalne i autentyczne, bardzo pozytywne, nieskrępowane, żywiołowe, wyraźnie różniące się typem figury i urody, nie idealnie piękne / modelowe

- **babcia (około 70 lat) //** **do 1 sceny **

aktorki/ grający naturszczycy z doświadczeniem, miejska fajna babcia, z luzem i naturalnością, otwarta i z auto dystansem 

**Wymagana umiejętność u wszystkich – śpiew aktorski / dobry śpiew amatorski i doświadczenie przed kamerą!**

Role epizodyczne nie mówione ale śpiewane, na dalszym etapie castingu wybrane osoby poproszę o nagranie wskazanej piosenki. 

**Prawa na 5 lat bez ograniczeń terytorialnych, pola eksploatacji TV, internet, kino, radio, outdoor, POS. **

**Zdjęcia 10 sierpnia 2026 w Krakowie (okolicach)**. 

Nie zapewniamy noclegu, ewentualnie zwrot kosztów dojazdu (paliwa, bilety na pociąg).

Zgłoszenia wraz ze zdjęciami, wideo wizytówką i danymi do kontaktu proszę przesyłać na adres: ***castingotwarty@gmail.com ***w tytule proszę o wpisanie roli, do której się zgłaszacie. 

Nie przyjmuję zaproszeń do znajomych, nie wchodzę w 

konwersacje pod postem i na priv - skontaktuję się z wybranymi osobami.

Dziękuję :)

sharedPost.text:
🎬 POSZUKUJEMY STATYSTÓW DO FILMU KOSTIUMOWEGO! Ekranizacja  znanej powiesci

Warszawa i okolice

Do filmu kostiumowego, którego akcja rozgrywa się w XIX wieku oraz na początku XX wieku, poszukujemy statystów.
📅 Terminy zdjęć:
11.08
13.08
Część osób zostanie wybrana do udziału w obu dniach zdjęciowych (kontynuacja), a część tylko na jeden z podanych terminów.
👔 Przymiarki kostiumów:
6.08
7.08
10.08

Poszukujemy osób do ról:
Mieszczanie
Typ pracowniczy
Żydzi

💰 Stawki:
120 zł – udział w jednym dniu zdjęciowym
180 zł – udział w dwóch dniach zdjęciowych (kontynuacja)
50 zł – przymiarka kostiumu
Płatność: gotówką.

Wymagania: Poszukujemy wyłącznie osób o naturalnym wyglądzie:
bez zabiegów medycyny estetycznej,
bez makijażu permanentnego brwi,
bez hybryd i pomalowanych paznokci,
bez tatuaży w widocznych miejscach,
bez włosów strzyżonych maszynką oraz bez współczesnych fryzur.

📧 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na adres: agencjasceneria.magda@gmail.com

Tytuł wiadomości: BB 113

W treści zgłoszenia prosimy podać:
aktualne zdjęcia twarzy oraz sylwetki (bez makijażu), Panowie - zdjecie boku I tyl fryzury. Panie zdjecie w rozpuszczonych wlosach
imię i nazwisko,
wiek,
informację o posiadanych tatuażach,
numer telefonu.

ZZapraszay

items.text:
Za każdą wyjątkową restauracją stoi wyjątkowy człowiek…
Szukamy restauratorów z całej Polski do nowego programu TV! 📺🍽️

Bo najlepsze jedzenie to dopiero początek…

Chcemy poznać ludzi, którzy stworzyli niesamowite miejsca z prawdziwą duszą. Restauracje, w których liczy się nie tylko to, co trafia na talerz, ale też historia, emocje, atmosfera i ludzie, którzy ją tworzą. ❤️

Szukamy wyjątkowych miejsc:

✨ restauracji z charakterem i niepowtarzalnym klimatem

✨ rodzinnych biznesów tworzonych z sercem

✨ kulinarnych perełek ukrytych w całej Polsce

✨ lokali, które mają swoją historię 

✨ właścicieli, dla których gotowanie i goszczenie ludzi to prawdziwa pasja

Czy goście przychodzą do Was nie tylko dla jedzenia, ale też dla atmosfery, którą stworzyliście?

Czy za Waszym miejscem stoi historia, którą warto opowiedzieć całej Polsce?

📩 Napisz do nas zgloszenia@rochstar.tv - w załączniku dodaj krótką wideowizytowkę i opis Twojej restauracji :)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'NAJLEPSZE JEDZENIE TO DOPIERO POCZĄTEK. Prowadzisz restauracje? POSZUKUJEMY RESTAURATORÓW DO NOWEGO PROGRAMU TV ZGŁOŚ SIĘ! ZGLOSZENIA@ROCHSTAR.TI @ROCHSTAR.TV'

items.text:
NOT LONG TO GO GET YOUR TICKETS NOW AT https://durhamfringe.co.uk/events/lights-music-thrills/

29th & 30th July at 5PM - all profits going to cancer research!

sharedPost.text:
LESS THAN 1 WEEK TO GO TILL LIGHTS, MUSIC & THRILLS

ALL PROFITS ARE GOING TO CANCER RESEARCH so if you want to learn about a whole new world and donate to an incredible cause - tickets are linked in bio or go to Durham fringe official website and search for the show

Venue - Palace Green Stretch Tent - Durham City Centre 
Time - 29th & 30th July at 5PM
Tickets - £3.50 - £5.00 pp
@durhamfringefest 

Lights, Music & Thrills is the fascinating, wonderful and sometimes weird world of one of the most endearing traditions of the life of the travelling showman. And the ups and downs he has to endure as his living depends on making people smile. Sometimes fun but sometimes a misunderstood and ugly way of life, looking from the outside in. You may well say the tears of a circus clown wearing himself thin for people’s enjoyment and indeed I should know! HERE TODAY AND IN NEXT WEEK TOMORROW...

ADDITIONAL CASTING CALL
We are casting for the remaining minor and non-speaking roles for our new paranormal comedy drama series, shooting between 9-17 August in Cardiff. Exact dates to be confirmed.

White Rabbit is a paranormal comedy drama about two painfully-millennial cousins who find themselves juggling the demands of running a failing pub all the while investigating the unexplained phenomena of a small town and produce a podcast about their adventures. 

DM or email for more info: matt.beale97@yahoo.com

Link to our GoFundMe: https://gofund.me/18dddb732

Follow @whiterabbitseries on Instagram for more updates as they are beamed to us from the mothership! 🛸 

#whiterabbitseries #comedy #sitcom #independentfilm

items.text:
Cosplay/er, a Horror Movie Born in Cosplay Culture

 

Cosplay/er is an independent horror feature filming in St. Petersburg, Florida in April 2027. The project is seeking actors (lead and supporting roles), extras, cosplayers, film crew, and volunteers. Portions of the film will be shot during St. Pete Comic Con 2027, creating an authentic convention atmosphere unlike anything that can be recreated on a soundstage.

 

The movie's crush-worthy characters and application forms can be found at the website: [https://cosplayslasher.com/](https://cosplayslasher.com/)

 

While not required for consideration, there are two in-person casting calls at fan conventions: Sunshine City Scare on August 15-16, and Holiday St. Pete on Nov. 21-22 - both at the Hilton St. Petersburg Bayfront. Registration is preferred. There are no fees associated with the casting calls or any other movie info sessions, but an event ticket is required for entry (tickets are affordable- $25 per).

items.text:
Casting Feature Film:  **HANDS WHICH SHED INNOCENT BLOOD**:

Shooting in Los Angeles - Oct./Nov. 2026   Must work Local

NON-UNION - Non-Paid — Copy; Credit; Meals

Please email resume, with updated pic; height; age range; link to reel please.

Ridgley.james@gmail.com

If selected - 1st Self-tape with sides

2nd - Live auditions.

Thank you SOOOO MUCHHHHHH!!!

**EMILY ROTH** — Female, 22. A classically trained violinist with a voluptuous figure and homely face, arriving in LA from the Midwest. Naive, awkward, and endearingly flustered in social situations — prone to word-fumbling and self-deprecating humor. Beneath that vulnerability lives cold, calculating menace and a buried rage that can surface without warning. Must play comic vulnerability and genuine danger with equal conviction. Violin performance skills a plus.

**PETER** — Male, 27. Wiry, quirky-cute, and nerdish. A self-contained, tech-savvy loner with a warm romantic side and a quietly dangerous undercurrent. Socially awkward but deeply perceptive, with a fiercely protective streak. Must balance genuine sweetness with controlled menace.

**XAVIER** — Male, 30s. Soap-star handsome with a charming surface and a cold, cunning interior. Carries an easy sneer and turns intimidating quickly. Fundamentally a predator dressed as a landlord.

**CHLOE** — Female, 30s. Blonde, outwardly ditzy and warm, but shrewd and calculating underneath. Can shift from sisterly to threatening in an instant. Sharp comic timing essential.

**AIDEN** — Male, late 20s–30s. Jim Morrison looks — magnetic, loud, crude, and self-destructive. Sexually aggressive with rare flashes of genuine feeling. Rockstar energy required.

**JASMINE** — Female (trans). Warm, plainspoken, and grounded — the moral compass of the piece. Genuine dignity and emotional intelligence are essential to the role.

**DETECTIVE ROBBINS** — Male, late 40s–mid 50s. Heavyset and grizzled. A no-nonsense, straight-talking cop with a cigarette perpetually on his lip. Dogged and suspicious, with occasional flashes of empathy.

**GORDON ROTH** — Male, 50s. Nick Nolte type — sandy-haired, weathered, and beaten. Fiercely loving toward his daughter; cold and dangerous to everyone else.

**VINCE DEMATTO** — Male, 30s. Slick and well-dressed. Predatory under a smooth, confident charm. Featured role.

**STEVE HANSEN** — Male, mid-30s. Clean-cut and polished — more Harvard lawyer than creative. Charismatic and manipulative. Featured role.

**DETECTIVE HERNANDEZ** — Any gender, age open. Professional and steady. Small recurring supporting role.

Casting Call for my film platform, Voyager Company’s Acting Art Team

*Non-Paid but food and beverages will be provided

Production primarily taking place in Chicagoland, IL.

Learn more at the Casting Call’s official post at the V.C. website:

https://vcfilms.weebly.com/casting-calls/intro-to-voyager-companys-acting-art-team-non-paid

sharedPost.text:
A look at past short films released and unreleased with some clips recycled for more experimentation in the editing process by myself. The goal was to prime myself for ideas that would match some of what I want to do in the future. 

The good news is that I can continue my cinematic experimentation with others for the VC Acting Art Team - which now has a casting call currently up at the the VC platform Casting Call page! Link in bio. 

I’ve got two actresses now joined and so there are 6 spots left for 2 more actresses and 4 actors. This is non-paid for now but there will always be food and beverages provided by myself. 💕

The following are featured in order for these clips: @alannah_swenka (Severance), @calliehlers (Failed Movements project), Myself experimenting years ago with special effects for a short action film series, My glass in a micro short tribute I did for Blade Runner 2049, and @benjamin.scott for a short we shot years ago. I do want to say Calli was so sweet to work with as well as everyone here 💕❤️

Fun fact: That’s Calli as an animated A.I. generation fused then dissolving into a live action clip of herself! 
I would like to learn how to keep doing this. It’s imperative as we enter a world with A.I sort of dominating it, that we find innovate ways into weaving it with our industries. That shot was a chance for me to learn how to pioneer something unique using A.I. within filmmaking. The other clips don’t use A.I. 

#cinema #art #media #entertainment #film

items.text:
🎥 In diesem Reel spricht Michael Weilguny über Vergünstigungen für Mitglieder in unserem Verein. 

👉 Sei dabei beim nächsten KBF! ✨☕️ 

📍 173. Künstler*innen Business Frühstück 
🗓️ Dienstag, 11.08.2026 – 7:15 Uhr 
🏨 Hotel Zeitgeist Vienna, Sonnwendgasse 15, 1100 Wien 

💬 Plaudermeeting: Kunst und Wirtschaft – Kooperationen mit Unternehmen 
🎙️ Moderation: Monika Medek

sharedPost.text:
🎥 In diesem Reel spricht Michael Weilguny über Vergünstigungen für Mitglieder in unserem Verein. 

👉 Sei dabei beim nächsten KBF! ✨☕️ 

📍 173. Künstler*innen Business Frühstück 
🗓️ Dienstag, 11.08.2026 – 7:15 Uhr 
🏨 Hotel Zeitgeist Vienna, Sonnwendgasse 15, 1100 Wien 

💬 Plaudermeeting: Kunst und Wirtschaft – Kooperationen mit Unternehmen 
🎙️ Moderation: Monika Medek 

Ob Sponsoring, Auftragsarbeiten oder CSR-Partnerschaften: Kunst kann für Unternehmen einen echten Mehrwert schaffen – in der Kommunikation, im gesellschaftlichen Engagement, bei der Mitarbeiter*innen-Bindung oder als Impuls für Innovation. 

Doch welche Schnittstellen gibt es zwischen Kultur und Wirtschaft? Welche Kooperationsmöglichkeiten lassen sich entwickeln? Und wie formuliere ich ein Angebot so, dass es für Unternehmen attraktiv, verständlich und relevant ist? 

In diesem interaktiven Plaudermeeting sprechen wir über Strategien, Argumente und konkrete Ansätze, mit denen sich künstlerische Projekte erfolgreich im unternehmerischen Umfeld positionieren lassen. 

Ein Frühstück für alle, die neue Partnerschaften aufbauen, ihre Projekte professionell präsentieren und die Zusammenarbeit zwischen Kunst und Wirtschaft aktiv gestalten möchten. 

©Congerdesign 

📲 Mehr Infos: 
Website: www.KünstlerBusinessFrühstück.at  
Facebook: https://fb.me/e/7MvGL7qkB  

#KunstUndWirtschaft #KulturUndWirtschaft #Kulturmanagement #Kreativwirtschaft

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon im Doppelpack

MOVIETIME OPEN AIR - die Zweite 2026

In der neuen Ausgabe bringt Sarah Fuchs die Highlights aus St. Pölten, Eggenburg und Mistelbach zu Gehör. 

Andreas Zeugswetter erzählt anlässlich 30 Jahre Mondscheinkino wie alles begann, gibt aber auch Anekdoten zum Besten. 

MOVIETIME KW 30/2026

31 Jahre nach dem Debüt und weiteren Fortsetzungen kehren die beliebten Figuren inkl. neuen Charakteren in TOY STORY 5 zurück. Ob dies ein Film voller Nostalgie oder doch auch ein Streifen für die Social Media Generation ist, berichtet ihnen Sarah Fuchs. 

Im Rahmen des Weinviertelfestivals 2026 konnte unsere Moderatorin mit den OrganisatorInnen des Projekt KellerSchichten plaudern. Wie viel Spaß dabei mit an Bord war, hören Sie bei uns.

Mittwoch 22.7.2026 von 17 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

items.text:
CASTING NOTICE ****
Gstyleproductions & Entertainment is Casting for two staged readings of original plays. They chronicle the antics and stories of the main character, Miss Betty-Jo Glam-mor’e. 
Project Details:
Location:Union NJ
Dates: Thursday, October 22,2026@7pm
Thursday, November 5,2026@7pm
Non-Union- Paid stipend for readings

To submit, please send in subject line role,headshot, resume and any conflicts you may have in October and November 
gstyleproductions@msn.com 
PLEASE review the roles below before submitting. ONLY SERIOUS AND DEPENDABLE actors wanted. 

***Gstyleproductions & Entertainment is also looking for a new production team: we are in need of stage managers, production assistants, assistant directors and sound technicians. Submit interest and information position of interest in subject line to gstyleproductions@msn.com****

Roles:
LeRosie-F 36-52, can sing, black/African descent – receptionist/office manager and best friend of Miss Betty

Savannah–F 21–35, can sing, black/African descent – salon ￼manager, 
educated Niece of Miss Betty ￼

Diamond ice – M 26–36, can sing, black/African descent – gay hairstylist with a lot of attitude

Yin Yang Leeroy-M 24 -34, Asian ￼, black/African descent, south Asian – nail tech/stylist who knows a lot about computers and security systems

Cha-cha chica–F 20–29 Hispanic descent – works as a shampoo, assistant, part-time, and office assistant part-time

Helga Ann –F 32–42 white/European descent – can sing, works as a massage therapist and fashion consultant

Detective Petey–M 25–35, can sing, black/African descent – local police officer/detective and Savannah‘s love interest

Baltimore –M 35–50, can sing, black/African descent – Miss Betty‘s boyfriend and all around great guy

Sasha –F 23 to 33, can sing, black/African descent – the Neighbourhood busybody gossiper

Lucinda, Mrs. Mourgeritte, young Gerome and old Gerome- chorus/ensemble all genders, 23–48, can sing, black/African descent, ethically ambiguous, multiracial, white, European descent – these are characters who are looking for online date matches

Mr. Snell –M 30–40, can sing, black/African descent, multiracial, ethnically ambiguous – Salon Client, who is a player

Miss Big –F 30– 50, can sing, black/African descent, multiracial, white/European descent, real estate developer and Salon Client ￼

items.text:
CASTING CALL-OUT FOR ALL – DELUGE (Short Film) - (PAID)
Production Title: DELUGE

Genre: Psychological Survival Drama

Logline:

After trying out a new wetsuit during a winter swim, a young woman discovers a secluded clay mudbank that becomes an unexpectedly calming escape. As the day slips away, her fascination turns into a fight for survival, forcing her to confront the danger of not knowing when to let go.

Synopsis

Deluge follows Maya, a 20 year old who heads to a quiet estuary to test out a new wetsuit recommended by her friend Jasmine. During her swim, Maya stumbles upon a hidden stretch of deep clay exposed by the receding tide. What begins as a peaceful and absorbing experience gradually becomes dangerous as she loses track of time and finds herself trapped in a sticky situation. Blending atmospheric visuals with grounded survival tension, Deluge explores how comfort, curiosity and desire can quietly become obsession.

CASTING

MAYA (Lead)

Gender: Female

Playing Age: 18 to 25

Maya is thoughtful, curious and adventurous. She enjoys spending time outdoors and finds peace in solitude. Throughout the film, her fascination with an unusual discovery gradually clouds her judgement, leading her into an increasingly dangerous situation. This role relies heavily on expressive, non verbal performance and emotional authenticity, with much of the story told through visual storytelling rather than dialogue.

SHOOT DETAILS

Location: TBA

Shoot Duration: Approximately 1 to 2 days

Pay will be negotiated based on actress rates and what the budget allows

Production Type: Independent Short Film

Independent Production

HOW TO APPLY

If you’re interested in auditioning or would like more information, please send a message including your name, age, a recent headshot and any previous acting experience (if applicable).

Messenger: James Spesac-Miller

Email: jamesspesac@gmail.com

We welcome performers of all experience levels and encourage anyone who feels they suit the role to get in touch.

items.text:
Looking for a Premiere Pro Editor (Paid)

Hi everyone!

I’m looking for someone to edit a 5-minute short film for a university project.

Requirements:
 • Edit in Adobe Premiere Pro only.
 • At the end of the project, I need the complete Premiere Pro project (.prproj file + all linked media and project files), as I’ll need to open and continue working on it later.
 • Create a short vertical Instagram trailer (9:16) from the existing footage.
 • I already have all the footage, including camera audio and boom audio, as well as the script and storyboard.
 • I need a rough cut by next Wednesday.

My budget is £50–70 for both the short film and the trailer, so I understand this may be more suitable for someone looking to build their portfolio or take on a small freelance project.

If you’re interested, please send me a message with examples of your previous work. Thank you!

LENICO PRODUCTIONS 🎥🎬
CREW CASTING CALL (LIVERPOOL)

We are building our next film & TV project right here in Liverpool and we are calling on the city’s crew whether that’s from no experience, a little experience, fully experienced professionals we want you 🫵to join the team.

We’re bringing together a passionate community for a low budget independent film shooting in the heart of Liverpool. This project isn’t just about creating a movie or TV series it’s about giving people a chance, learning together, and building something real for the city.

So this is your opportunity to be part of something creative, local and collaborative where everyone’s effort truly counts.

Current team 👇

Director: me 
Main actor: me
Scriptwriters
Makeup artists 
Drivers 
Editors 
Producer
Casting director 

We’re currently hiring 🤔:

Director ( additional ) & 1st, 2nd ,3rd ,4th ,5th assistant directors

Producer ( additional ) & producer assistant 

Camera operator 

Sound recordist 

Gaffer

Lighting assistants 

Location scout 

Location manager 

Catering team 

Drivers ( additional )

Makeup artist ( additional ) 

And many more roles … 🤔💯

If you’re passionate about filmmaking and want to be part of something real, drop me a email to:

Cheethamlennie55@gmail.com

Or contact me on WhatsApp on :

07405 341946

Let’s make Liverpool cinematic. 💥
#LenicoProductions #LiverpoolFilm #CastingCall #FilmCrew #UKFilmIndustry

items.text:
Jodi Purdy Casting Director

CASTING CALL!!

ADDITIONAL ROLES HAVE BEEN ADDED & SARAH CAN BE 30’s - 40’s & MARK CAN BE 40’s - 50’s.  THE CHAIRMAN’S BREAKDOWN HAS BEEN EXPANDED.

Seeking Non-Union Actors & Actresses to submit for the below captioned roles for an Independent Feature Film 
Written & Directed by David J. McDivitt

“NIGHT WATCH”

Filming: Medford, MA
August 2026
Compensation: TBD

Submit the following via Google Drive or Email Attachment to:

JodiPurdyCasting@gmail.com
Subject: NIGHT WATCH – [ROLE] – [YOUR NAME]

Name
Cell
Email
Location
Photos 
Acting Resume
Reels - if available
Links - if available 
1 minute Introduction Video

Questions? Send in Email! Not Facebook Messenger! Not in Comments!

ROLES:

SARAH (Lead)
Female | 30’s - 40’s | Caucasian

A Vanguard Financial administrator whose Christmas is shattered when a hit squad invades her home and forces her to use her Level 5 server access. 
Terrified, intelligent, protective, and deeply devoted to her husband. Sarah is one of the film’s most layered characters, balancing vulnerability with extraordinary strength.

MARK (Lead) 
Male | 40s - 50’s | Caucasian

A recently retired detective held captive and tortured during the home invasion. Calm under pressure, morally grounded, and impossible to break. His battle with the antagonist is one of philosophy and willpower as much as survival.

NEW ROLES:

CHARACTER: GRANDPA (JOHN)

Supporting / Day Player | Male, 60s–70s
Sarah’s father — easygoing, affectionate, happy to play along with the family’s Christmas morning routine.

CHARACTER: GRANDMA (BETTE)

Supporting / Day Player | Female, 60s–70s
Sarah’s mother — warm, doting, a little blunt, thrilled to whisk the grandkids off to New York for the holiday.

CHARACTER: LILY
Supporting / Day Player | Female, 11 - Caucasian
Sarah and Mark’s daughter — bright, a little bossy with her younger brother, excited for the trip.

CHARACTER: LEO
Supporting / Day Player | Male, 8
Sarah and Mark’s son — playful, a little mischievous with his older sister, excited for the trip.

EXPANDED CHARACTER BREAKDOWN:

THE CHAIRMAN

Previous: Male, 60s. Sophisticated, elegant, and completely in control.

Few lines – but every word carries enormous weight.

Lean further into old-money excess and detachment – a man so insulated by wealth that household staff attend to his most basic personal needs. Imperious, entitled, and thoroughly out of touch with ordinary life. Still sophisticated and controlled on the surface; the disconnection from reality should read as absolute, unexamined comfort, not cartoonish villainy.

ONE (Lead/Antagonist)
Male | 40s | Open Ethnicity
 
The brilliant, philosophical leader of the hit squad. Calm, precise, and chillingly intelligent. He doesn’t see himself as a villain—he believes he’s correcting a broken system. Looking for an actor who can command a scene through quiet confidence rather than intimidation.

BENNY (Supporting)
Male | 20s | Open Ethnicity 

A young security guard with a passion for technology and cybersecurity. Friendly, funny, and genuinely likable. Benny unexpectedly becomes one of the story’s emotional anchors.

THE CHAIRMAN - (Supporting)
Male | 60s | Caucasian

The unseen power behind the operation. Sophisticated, elegant, and completely in control. Few lines—but every word carries enormous weight. A memorable role for a seasoned actor.

HACKER (Supporting)
Female | 20s–30s | Open Ethnicity

The technical specialist of the hit squad. Brilliant, fearless, and physically capable. Sharp-witted with a dry sense of humor, she’s completely at home inside the server room—and dangerous in a fight.

BRUNO (Supporting)
Male | 30s–40s | Open Ethnicity

The team’s physical enforcer. Tough, impulsive, and impatient. Beneath the muscle is a man carrying personal pain and quiet regret, giving the character surprising emotional depth.

Supporting / Day Player | Male, 60s–70s
Sarah’s father — easygoing, affectionate, happy to play along with the family’s Christmas morning routine.

CHARACTER: GRANDMA (BETTE)

Supporting / Day Player | Female, 60s–70s
Sarah’s mother — warm, doting, a little blunt, thrilled to whisk the grandkids off to New York for the holiday.

CHARACTER: LILY
Supporting / Day Player | Female, 11 - Caucasian
Sarah and Mark’s daughter — bright, a little bossy with her younger brother, excited for the trip.

CHARACTER: LEO
Supporting / Day Player | Male, 8
Sarah and Mark’s son — playful, a little mischievous with his older sister, excited for the trip.

EXPANDED CHARACTER BREAKDOWN:

THE CHAIRMAN

Previous: Male, 60s. Sophisticated, elegant, and completely in control.

Few lines – but every word carries enormous weight.

Lean further into old-money excess and detachment – a man so insulated by wealth that household staff attend to his most basic personal needs. Imperious, entitled, and thoroughly out of touch with ordinary life. Still sophisticated and controlled on the surface; the disconnection from reality should read as absolute, unexamined comfort, not cartoonish villainy.

ONE (Lead/Antagonist)
Male | 40s | Open Ethnicity
 
The brilliant, philosophical leader of the hit squad. Calm, precise, and chillingly intelligent. He doesn’t see himself as a villain—he believes he’s correcting a broken system. Looking for an actor who can command a scene through quiet confidence rather than intimidation.

BENNY (Supporting)
Male | 20s | Open Ethnicity 

A young security guard with a passion for technology and cybersecurity. Friendly, funny, and genuinely likable. Benny unexpectedly becomes one of the story’s emotional anchors.

THE CHAIRMAN - (Supporting)
Male | 60s | Caucasian

The unseen power behind the operation. Sophisticated, elegant, and completely in control. Few lines—but every word carries enormous weight. A memorable role for a seasoned actor.

HACKER (Supporting)
Female | 20s–30s | Open Ethnicity

The technical specialist of the hit squad. Brilliant, fearless, and physically capable. Sharp-witted with a dry sense of humor, she’s completely at home inside the server room—and dangerous in a fight.

BRUNO (Supporting)
Male | 30s–40s | Open Ethnicity

The team’s physical enforcer. Tough, impulsive, and impatient. Beneath the muscle is a man carrying personal pain and quiet regret, giving the character surprising emotional depth.
