items.text:
RUSH CASTING CHEATERS INVESTIGATION – REMOTE 

Reality-Inspired YouTube Series (3.6M Subscribers)

• Seeking talent in the U.S.

• Film Date: July 25th or 26th (booked one day for 1 hour)

• Rate: $100 EACH for up to 1 hour (paid same day)

• Location: Virtual via Zoom

This is a virtual, reality-style improv scene focused on a cheating confrontation over Zoom. Strong reactions and comfort with improv are key. Character names will be used.

“Date” moments (hugging, holding hands, kissing, etc.) will be shown during the Zoom using AI-generated images not acted out live.

ROLES:

Male + Female Duo (18+) – Looking for any male/female duo who can portray a couple. Does NOT need to be a real couple. Friends, roommates, actors, etc. welcome. Must film from the same location on one Zoom. Strong personalities encouraged.

TO SUBMIT:

• Names of all individuals submitting

• Emails + phone numbers (for each person)

• 2 recent photos per person

• Confirm you are over 18

• Time Zone

Submit via email: jackiesmithcasting@gmail.com

Or text: (813) 438-2094

items.text:
Great news! The Bad Acting masterclass has a new date: Sunday, August 16.
That also means you now have a little more time to register and join us for four hours of taking risks, letting go of the pressure to be “good,” and discovering what freer, more truthful acting can actually feel like.

Bad Acting: How Doing It Wrong Can Set You Free

Sunday, August 16

1:00–5:00 PM ET

In person at The AWA Lab in Toronto, with a live Zoom observer option for those joining from elsewhere in Canada or abroad.

More info and registration: 

https://forms.gle/J67CTvZTz4jEZQyo9

🇺🇸 Another is a fantastic opportunity for actors!

General American Accent for Actors with Sam Malone – Royal Central lecturer, RADA–NYU Tisch voice coach, and voice practitioner whose students have gone on to work in Heartstopper, Masters of the Air, Hadestown, Six, Mean Girls, Mamma Mia! and more.

by Actorverse www.actorverse.co.uk

Build a stronger, more authentic General American accent.

This practical 2-hour workshop is designed for actors with beginner to intermediate General American experience. You’ll work on a contemporary U.S. scene with other actors while receiving personalised accent coaching in a supportive small-group environment.

📅 Tuesday 4 August | 6–8 PM
📅 Tuesday 18 August | 6–8 PM
Each session features a different scene, so you’re welcome to attend one or both.

BOOK HERE

https://www.tickettailor.com/events/actorverse

or visit www.actorverse.co.uk for more information

Fitzrovia Community Centre
2 Foley Street, London W1W 6DL

Limited places available to ensure personalised feedback.

items.title: 🇺🇸 Another is a fantastic opportunity for actors!

items.text:
# 🎭 FINAL CASTING CALL – *A Place Not Mine* 🎭

Our cast is almost complete, and we're looking for **the final four performers** to join our original musical, **A Place Not Mine**, performing in **London this November**.

If you're looking to be part of a new original production with a passionate creative team, we'd love to hear from you.
## 🎭 Currently Casting
🎭 RIVEN

**Male | Playing Age: 18–25**
**Vocal Range: Baritone / Tenor**

Sensitive. Thoughtful. Haunted by the past.

Riven carries the emotional weight of the story. He's constantly torn between protecting the people he loves and facing his own fears, slowly discovering who he truly is.

**Character inspiration:** *Riven (Winx Club) × Connor Murphy (Dear Evan Hansen)*

**Please note:** This role includes a **staged kiss with another male actor** as part of the storyline.

🌙 SELENE

**Female | Playing Age: 18–25 / Soprano/Mezzo**

Funny. Honest. Fearlessly herself.

Selene speaks before she thinks, has absolutely no filter, and somehow always manages to make everyone laugh. Beneath her playful personality is someone incredibly loyal who would do anything for the people she loves.

**Character inspiration:** *Alex Russo × Barbie*

✨ ELARA

**Female | Playing Age: 18–25 / Any vocal range **

Confident. Sharp. Ambitious.

Elara isn't afraid to challenge people and has a naturally commanding presence. She may seem intimidating at first, but beneath her strong exterior is someone who loves fiercely and protects those closest to her.

**Character inspiration:** *Jade West (Victorious)*

🌿 ROWAN

**Male | Playing Age: 18–25**
**Vocal Range: Baritone / Tenor**

Charming. Quick-witted. The friend everyone needs.

Rowan is effortlessly likeable, always ready with a joke, but he's also the one who keeps everyone together when things begin to fall apart. Loyal, emotionally intelligent and impossible not to love.

## 🎤 Audition Process

1️⃣ Send us a DM expressing your interest.

2️⃣ If shortlisted, we'll arrange a short phone interview with the creative team.

3️⃣ Finally, send us a **30–60 second singing recording**.
**Disney songs are preferred, but not essential.**

## 📍 Rehearsals

London

• Sundays
• One additional weekday evening rehearsal (around cast availability)
## 🎭 Performances

**29th & 30th November 2026**

## 💙 Payment

This is currently an **unpaid independent production**.

We are applying for external arts funding and, **if successful, all available performer funding will be shared fairly across the cast.**

If one of these characters feels like you, we'd absolutely love to hear from you.

📩 **DM @a.place.not.mine to apply.**

Please feel free to **share this post** with anyone who may be interested. 💙

items.text:
🎭 WE'RE HIRING! Foreign Dancers Needed in China 🌟

📍 Location: Zhuhai, China

🌍 Nationality: Colombia 🇨🇴, Argentina 🇦🇷, Brazil 🇧🇷 (no black skin)

👤 Age: 18 – 30 years old

📌 Open Positions:

🔹 10 MALES – Minimum height: 178 cm

🔹 10 FEMALES – Minimum height: 168 cm

📅 Key Dates:

🔸 Rehearsals: August 27 – 31, 2026

🔸 Performance Period: September 1, 2026 – May 31, 2028

🎬 Show Schedule:

⏱️ 6 shows per day (25 minutes each)

🕐 Total: Max 150 minutes daily

🗓️ Days Off: 4 days off per month

🏠 Accommodation: Twin-sharing room (double bedroom)

🍜 Food Allowance: 1,800 RMB/month (60 RMB/day)

✈️ Transportation: Round-trip international flights covered

🛂 Visa: Visa fees covered by us

🔥 Limited spots available – Apply now! 📩

topComments.text:

but you want people from Colombia Argentina and Brazil but they have to be white ? Wild

items.text:
CASTING CALL - VOLUNTEER
Hi all! We are looking for some more roles to fill in for ‘The Museum of Admirable Suffering’, a film created by a passionate crew of CapU alumni and students

This call is for the roles of a couple: we are open to anyone interested that fits the role. It is volunteer and for 1 day only among the 4 shooting dates.

(We posted calls for our other characters a few days ago, if you’re interested check those out if you haven’t!)

If you are interested please email or dm me your headshots and a reel if you have one:

arjungillfilm@gmail.com

@arjungillfilm

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.

sharedPost.text:
🌟 URGENT CALL OUT - FEAR FACTOR S2 IS LOOKING FOR CHALLENGE PA'S 🌟

>>PAID WORK!<<

Non-Union ONLY!

Looking for CHALLENGE PA's - to help test our challenges!

Must be fearless and take anything we throw at them! Will need to be ok with Swimming, Heights, Extreme physical challenges, pain, claustrophobia, eating gross things, ok with bugs and animals etc.

🌟 LOCATION: BRITANNIA BEACH, BC 
(and surrounding area. Must be a BC resident to apply)

📅 Dates Needed: 
Multiple Dates Available from July 22-Aug 31, 2026 
No Travel Pay

🌟 Ages: 19-60s, Any Genders and Any Ethnicities

Rate of Pay: 25$/hour Min 6 hours pay
Must be available up to 12 hour days. 

To apply, Please fill out the application link here: 
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc3gDdTqhF-odPO5Xwmov1JWs-wK4LyL8Pjn6f5X4tf6Psq6g/viewform

Don’t miss this opportunity to be a part of something special. Apply now!

sharedPost.text:
Casting SA’s for exciting post apocalyptic movie , called “N.E.S.T. Project”. IMDb credited , voluntary project filming in Manchester. Shooting this week. They are looking for plenty of folk to play scavengers in an exciting project. Email our good friend Johnny @ johnnywilsonno1@gmail.com for details 
Filming currently (22nd July to 25th July)

items.text:
Za każdą wyjątkową restauracją stoi wyjątkowy człowiek…
Szukamy restauratorów z całej Polski do nowego programu TV! 📺🍽️

Bo najlepsze jedzenie to dopiero początek…

Chcemy poznać ludzi, którzy stworzyli niesamowite miejsca z prawdziwą duszą. Restauracje, w których liczy się nie tylko to, co trafia na talerz, ale też historia, emocje, atmosfera i ludzie, którzy ją tworzą. ❤️

Szukamy wyjątkowych miejsc:

✨ restauracji z charakterem i niepowtarzalnym klimatem

✨ rodzinnych biznesów tworzonych z sercem

✨ kulinarnych perełek ukrytych w całej Polsce

✨ lokali, które mają swoją historię 

✨ właścicieli, dla których gotowanie i goszczenie ludzi to prawdziwa pasja

Czy goście przychodzą do Was nie tylko dla jedzenia, ale też dla atmosfery, którą stworzyliście?

Czy za Waszym miejscem stoi historia, którą warto opowiedzieć całej Polsce?

📩 Napisz do nas zgloszenia@rochstar.tv - w załączniku dodaj krótką wideowizytowkę i opis Twojej restauracji :)

sharedPost.text:
🎬 POSZUKUJEMY STATYSTÓW DO FILMU KOSTIUMOWEGO! Ekranizacja  znanej powiesci

Warszawa i okolice

Do filmu kostiumowego, którego akcja rozgrywa się w XIX wieku oraz na początku XX wieku, poszukujemy statystów.
📅 Terminy zdjęć:
11.08
13.08
Część osób zostanie wybrana do udziału w obu dniach zdjęciowych (kontynuacja), a część tylko na jeden z podanych terminów.
👔 Przymiarki kostiumów:
6.08
7.08
10.08

Poszukujemy osób do ról:
Mieszczanie
Typ pracowniczy
Żydzi

💰 Stawki:
120 zł – udział w jednym dniu zdjęciowym
180 zł – udział w dwóch dniach zdjęciowych (kontynuacja)
50 zł – przymiarka kostiumu
Płatność: gotówką.

Wymagania: Poszukujemy wyłącznie osób o naturalnym wyglądzie:
bez zabiegów medycyny estetycznej,
bez makijażu permanentnego brwi,
bez hybryd i pomalowanych paznokci,
bez tatuaży w widocznych miejscach,
bez włosów strzyżonych maszynką oraz bez współczesnych fryzur.

📧 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na adres: agencjasceneria.magda@gmail.com

Tytuł wiadomości: BB 113

W treści zgłoszenia prosimy podać:
aktualne zdjęcia twarzy oraz sylwetki (bez makijażu), Panowie - zdjecie boku I tyl fryzury. Panie zdjecie w rozpuszczonych wlosach
imię i nazwisko,
wiek,
informację o posiadanych tatuażach,
numer telefonu.

ZZapraszay

TONIE TO NIE KONIEC. Zamiast kolejnego roku w studium aktorskim, WEJDZ NA SCENĘ. U NAS: grasz w prawdziwych spektaklach pracujesz z reżyserem zdobywasz zdobywaszdoświadczenie doświadczenie uczysz się przez uczyszsięprzezgranie granie NIE ICZYMY BYCIA AKTOREM. ROBIMY AKTORÓW. WOLIMIERZ SPEKTAKLE DLA DZIECI MŁODZIEŻY ZGŁOSZENIA/ ZGŁOSZENIA/KONTAKT: KONTAKT: teatrmlodegowidza@o2.p KONTAKT: 600 236 KONTAKT:600236767 767 NIE CZEKAJ ROK. WEJDZ NA SCENĘ.'

items.text:
Piękno należy wesprzeć, bo tworzą je nieliczni, a potrzebuje wielu. / J.W. Goethe

Zapraszamy wykonawców piosenki artystycznej do udziału w przesłuchaniach eliminacyjnych Konkursu Krajowego 30. jubileuszowej edycji Ogólnopolskiego Festiwalu Piosenki Artystycznej OFPA w Rybniku!

Eliminacje do finału Konkursu Krajowego odbędą się 24 i 25 września!

W Festiwalu może wziąć udział wokalista, który ukończył 16. rok życia i przygotuje dwa utwory w języku polskim spośród piosenek poetyckich, autorskich lub aktorskich. Uczestnik może wystąpić z jednym akompaniatorem lub przy własnym akompaniamencie.

Zapraszamy do zapoznania się z REGULAMINEMi formularzem zgłoszeniowym.

Szczegółowe informacje dotyczące festiwalu udostępniane będą na stronie oficjalnej OFPA i profilu FB

items.title: (no title)

items.text:
Behind the Scenes.

Es ist immer wieder spannend zu erleben, wie aus einem leeren Studio innerhalb weniger Stunden eine komplette Produktion entsteht. Licht, Styling, Make-up, Technik, Produktion, Fotografie – jedes Team arbeitet anders und entwickelt seinen ganz eigenen Rhythmus.

Vor Kurzem war das Team von Motor Presse Hamburg für ein Cover-Shooting der Women's Health bei uns im Onlight Studio zu Gast.

Vielen Dank an alle Beteiligten für die angenehme Zusammenarbeit. Ich freue mich schon auf das fertige Cover.

Das Studio wird regelmäßig für Foto- und Filmproduktionen, Musikvideos, Castings, Showreels, Werbeshootings und Content-Produktionen genutzt. Gleichzeitig bietet es Raum für Workshops, Business-Meetings und kreative Projekte.

Falls ihr für eure nächste Produktion eine passende Location im Rhein-Main-Gebiet sucht, findet ihr weitere Informationen unter:

www.onlight-studiorent.net

#BehindTheScenes #Filmproduktion #Schauspiel #Musikvideo #Studio #Frankfurt

items.title: Behind the Scenes.

sharedPost.text:
Just do it…

Das Singen ist ganzheitlich!
Es fördert unsere Synapsenverbindungen unseres Gehirns, trainiert unser Kurz-und Langzeitgedächtnis!
Unzählige Abläufe werden im Hirn gespeichert, Muskulatur wird bewegt und trainiert, Endorphine werden frei gesetzt, was dazu führt , dass wir Freude, Emotionen und ein wohliges Gefühl in uns spüren!

Also , worauf noch warten ?

Die Zeit ist jetzt!

Du brauchst keine  Vorkenntnisse!
Ich helfe Dir, deine Stimme , deinen Klang und dein richtiges Körpergefühl zu finden!

Ich freue mich auf genau DICH!

Ihre / Eure 
Annette Kuhn
www.annette- kuhn.de

( Gross Gerau)

items.text:
🎬PAID-  ACTORS AGES 18–25

Amega Studios is looking for bright, energetic young men and women for a family-friendly comedy YouTube project in English. Filming is already underway!

The project is produced by the team behind H2O, a YouTube channel with 2 million subscribers.

If you’re natural on camera and enjoy comedy, challenges, and fun activities, we’d love to hear from you! Acting experience is a plus but not required.

📍 Westlake Village, California
🎭 Non-Union
💵 Rate: $100 per shoot day

To apply, email castyoutube@gmail.com with:

• Your name, age, and city of residence
• Recent photos
• A link to your Instagram, TikTok, or acting reel, if available
• A short 1–2 minute video introducing yourself

items.text: Nice story from these folks!! #voiceover #voiceactor #onlinevoiceovercoach #vocoaching #voiceacting Marc Graue https://www.instagram.com/p/DbJXZpaSZcw/?igsh=MWswNnprazl5ZXcydw==
items.previewTitle:
Marc Graue is the founder of Marc Graue Voice Over & Post, a Hollywood recording studio that has helped shape the voice over industry for more than four decades. Through his passion for storytelling, commitment to excellence, and ability to adapt to an ever-changing industry, Marc has built a trusted name in voice over coaching, recording, and post-production. His journey is a reminder that believing in your vision, embracing change, and staying resilient can turn challenges into lasting success. ✨

#VoiceOver #FounderStory #CreativeEntrepreneur #EntertainmentIndustry #businessstories

items.text:
NOT LONG TO GO GET YOUR TICKETS NOW AT https://durhamfringe.co.uk/events/lights-music-thrills/

29th & 30th July at 5PM - all profits going to cancer research!

sharedPost.text:
LESS THAN 1 WEEK TO GO TILL LIGHTS, MUSIC & THRILLS

ALL PROFITS ARE GOING TO CANCER RESEARCH so if you want to learn about a whole new world and donate to an incredible cause - tickets are linked in bio or go to Durham fringe official website and search for the show

Venue - Palace Green Stretch Tent - Durham City Centre 
Time - 29th & 30th July at 5PM
Tickets - £3.50 - £5.00 pp
@durhamfringefest 

Lights, Music & Thrills is the fascinating, wonderful and sometimes weird world of one of the most endearing traditions of the life of the travelling showman. And the ups and downs he has to endure as his living depends on making people smile. Sometimes fun but sometimes a misunderstood and ugly way of life, looking from the outside in. You may well say the tears of a circus clown wearing himself thin for people’s enjoyment and indeed I should know! HERE TODAY AND IN NEXT WEEK TOMORROW...

items.text: Hi everyone! I'm currently looking for acting opportunities and would love to connect with casting directors, filmmakers, and creatives. I'm professionally trained at the Oxford School of Drama and the went to LAMDA before having to leave due to an injury in my first year but there is where I developed a strong foundation in screen and stage acting. I'm passionate, hardworking, and always looking to take on exciting new projects. If you're casting or know of any opportunities, I'd love to hear from you. Thanks so much!

🎄 EARLY CHRISTMAS ELF CASTING – 2026 GROTTO CONTRACT 🎄
We're casting early (but necessarily!) for our magical Christmas Grottos across the UK – and we’re on the lookout for charismatic, professional Christmas Elves to join the team!

📆 Contract: November – December 2026

💸 Rate: Varies per venue, TBC via email 

📍 Locations: 

* Woburn Sands – Milton Keynes

* Willington – Bedfordshire

* East Bridgford – Nottinghamshire

* Worlds End – Aylesbury 

* Newbridge – Horsham

✨ Requirements:

• Entry-level acting skills

• Basic script work and immersive performance ability

• Confident group singing of children’s Christmas songs

🧝‍♀️ We’re looking for:

• Confident, energetic performers with great improvisation skills

• Friendly, reliable team players

• Previous experience working with children or in character-based roles is a plus

📌 Important Info:

• Costume and full training provided

• Paid rehearsals and site visits will be scheduled in early November – exact dates TBC

• Below is the confirmed list of working dates and shift times:

( Please note these are the most shifts available at one venue, shifts WILL vary per different venue) 

✅ Shift Dates & Times

• Sat, Nov 14 - 9:30 AM to 5:00 PM

• Sun, Nov 15 - 9:00 AM to 4:45 PM

• Sat, Nov 21 - 8:30 AM to 6:00 PM

• Sun, Nov 22 – 9:00 AM to 4:45 PM

• Thu, Nov 26 – 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM

• Fri, Nov 27 – 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM

• Sat, Nov 28 - 8:30 AM to 6:00 PM

• Sun, Nov 29 - 9:00 AM to 4:45 PM

• Mon, Nov 30 – 1:30 PM to 7:00 PM

• Mon, Dec 14 – 10:30 AM to 7:00 PM

📩 To apply:

Send your CV, headshot, and any relevant performance footage to: castings@evokeents.com

Subject line: CHRISTMAS ELF CASTING along with your desired venue

Tell us a little about why you’d be a great fit & the dates you're interested in working — we’d love to hear from you!

Tomorrow! FREE SCENE STUDY Zoom Masterclass
Saturday, July 25 at 12 PM ET

Watch a scene get taken apart in real time, the AWA Lab way, and learn how to take your work a step further than the usual idea of “scene study”.

Join us here: https://forms.gle/YE8Gi7oMdkF6wtc26

www.theawalab.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people and text that says '" All llofus.onsome of us, on some level, look for the the "right" way one answer, one approach, one shortcut that will make everything work. The truth is in life, and in acting, there is no magical solution. But there are ways to learn how to create the magic yourself. Alina, Founder, The AWA Lab AWA Lab'

🎬 Casting Call – Female Dancer Required for Telugu/Bollywood Song Shoot 💃✨
📍 Location: Hyderabad, India 🇮🇳

📅 Schedule: 1st week of August

🎭 Project: Telugu Film / Bollywood Style Song Shoot

💃 Looking For:

Female dancers with strong performance skills and stage presence.

✨ Requirements:

• Nationality preference: Moroccan / Middle Eastern

• Age: 20–25 years

• Appearance: Fair complexion, beautiful look, black hair, expressive eyes

• Dance style: Hip Hop & Freestyle

• Professional dance experience preferred

🗓 Duration:

• 3 days rehearsal

• 4–5 days shooting

✈️ Production Coverage:

✅ Flight provided

✅ Visa provided

✅ Accommodation provided

✅ Food provided

💰 Rate/Budget:

Daily rate will be finalized after profile selection.

📩 To Apply, please send:

• Recent photos

• Dance videos / showreel

• Age & nationality

• Previous experience details

📲 WhatsApp Only: 0561905778

Karim Hashad

Only serious and available dancers please.

Atlanta it’s that time again! Our short film The Airport Job  is casting for EXTRAS!! We are seeking actors of all skill levels to shoot with us October 2 - October 4 in ATLANTA, GA!! For the extras, we are able to offer free professional headshots, IMDb credits, & footage for your reel. ! In exchange for 2h of your time! Submit your headshots to movies@millenniproductions.com 

LOGLINE: Desperate for work, a young Brooklyn woman takes a night-shift airport security job under false pretenses — only to be ground down by exhaustion, exploitation, and a harrowing act of public indecency, before finally reaching a breaking point that costs her the job and nearly costs her mor

Kt: black toddler kid age 4-6 
Energetic and talkative

Office manager: male age 35-55
Stern and assertive

Subway extras: male and female any race any age
Dressed for work or school 

Guard: male or female age 25-50

Supervisor: Black male age 35-55 

Submit your headshots to movies@millenniproductions.com. Should you have any questions, call/text 678 491 6064

items.text:
CASTING CALL – FEATURE HORROR FILM "The Whistler"

We're casting two supporting roles for our upcoming independent horror feature filming in  lumberton/fayetteville North Carolina. Looking for actors who can bring believable performances and work well with an ensemble cast.

Filming:  August 29th and 30th
Pay: $25–$50 per day (based on experience and role requirements)

If you're interested, please send:

Headshot (or recent photos)

Acting reel or self-tape (if available)

Resume (if available)

Your location and age to email: 
Thewhistlemovie@gmail.com

Feel free to tag actors who might be interested. We look forward to seeing your submissions!

items.text:
Hello! I'm currently seeking a Colorist and an Audio Post-Production Engineer / Re-Recording Mixer for an independent feature documentary nearing post-production.

Colorist: I'm looking for someone with documentary or narrative feature experience who can help develop a natural, cinematic look.

Audio: The work is primarily dialogue cleanup, EQ, balancing, noise reduction, and final mix preparation. I'll be handling the cue and sync music, so this is more about sculpting and enhancing the existing audio than creating an extensive sound design from scratch.

If you're interested, please send me a DM with:

Your CV or résumé

A link to your reel, website, or portfolio

Relevant documentary or feature film credits

General availability and rates

I look forward to connecting with talented post-production professionals. Recommendations and shares are always appreciated.

items.summary:
Hello! I'm currently seeking a Colorist and an Audio Post-Production Engineer / Re-Recording Mixer for an independent feature documentary nearing post-production.

Colorist: I'm looking for someone with documentary or narrative feature experience who can help develop a natural, cinematic look.

Audio: The work is primarily dialogue cleanup, EQ, balancing, noise reduction, and final mix preparation. I'll be handling the cue and sync music, so this is more about sculpting and enhancing the existing audio than creating an extensive sound design from scratch.

If you're interested, please send me a DM with:

Your CV or résumé

A link to your reel, website, or portfolio

Relevant documentary or feature film credits

General availability and rates

I look forward to connecting with talented post-production professionals. Recommendations and shares are always appreciated.

[#Documentary](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/documentary?__cft__[0]=AZbMuYoGIeYkIt75Ef1p0IGVR0jz9qL06YQZ3vyQSs4ZSzQzJ06eBDJjwiqnLfGKD4d1f14ZMF88r2_7zCEi-Ncy64pNtRFJYwMKxkD1WIMZx9XhW0iVWbWrC99mVvau_G-cT3qcezKzoCHGRWD0p0Yl-18YTIc-DcY23hH1ftkiUeGKEs3oxwMOBraEwxA1oS0&__tn__=*NK-R) [#DocumentaryFilm](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/documentaryfilm?__cft__[0]=AZbMuYoGIeYkIt75Ef1p0IGVR0jz9qL06YQZ3vyQSs4ZSzQzJ06eBDJjwiqnLfGKD4d1f14ZMF88r2_7zCEi-Ncy64pNtRFJYwMKxkD1WIMZx9XhW0iVWbWrC99mVvau_G-cT3qcezKzoCHGRWD0p0Yl-18YTIc-DcY23hH1ftkiUeGKEs3oxwMOBraEwxA1oS0&__tn__=*NK-R) [#PostProduction](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/postproduction?__cft__[0]=AZbMuYoGIeYkIt75Ef1p0IGVR0jz9qL06YQZ3vyQSs4ZSzQzJ06eBDJjwiqnLfGKD4d1f14ZMF88r2_7zCEi-Ncy64pNtRFJYwMKxkD1WIMZx9XhW0iVWbWrC99mVvau_G-cT3qcezKzoCHGRWD0p0Yl-18YTIc-DcY23hH1ftkiUeGKEs3oxwMOBraEwxA1oS0&__tn__=*NK-R)

items.text: Hi my littliest daughter is currently with an agency but cant continue with them due to going to school in september. We are unable to continue attending the classes as they are currently during the day. She is aged 4. Does anyone know of any agencies that have there books open please.

topComments.text: Unfortunately, your agency is not a legitimate agency
Agents don’t require classes. You shouldn’t be paying an agent anything but commission on booked work.

sharedPost.text:
Working on something more lyrical in this Summer heat!! 🥵🔥 Still getting a good workout in though……whilst exploring and developing our artistry! 🙌 

Because this is a DANCE class, not a dance-fitness workout. COMPLETE beginners are welcome here! We work to levels that assist and stretch everybody. You’ll get a great workout, sure! But you’ll get so much more besides. Come and try out your new favourite thing to do!

If you’re interested, come and give it a go! First class just £3. - The style changes every few weeks. (Take a look at our other videos.) 

#danceclass #fitnessjourney #beginnersclass #newhobby #meetnewpeople

items.text:
Hi all,

We’re still looking for as many extras as possible for a short Horror film we’re shooting this Thursday at The Hope Street Theatre. 

If you’re available and would like to be a part of the film, please contact amulliganfilm@gmail.com or message me directly. Please share to anyone else who you think may be interested. We can also provide catering on set for those involved 🙂

Looking forward to hearing from some of you,
Andrew

topComments.text: I cant manage tomorrow, but if anything else comes up like this I'd definitely be interested Andrew! 👍
Sent you an email Andrew 👍

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'Extras Needed SHORT HORROR FILM WHERE: THE HOPE STREET THEATRE 22 HOPE ST. LIVERPOOL L1 9BY WHEN: THURSDAY 23RD JULY CALL TIME: 2PM EST. EST.END END TIME: 5PM WHAT'S REQUIRED: YOU WILL FORM PART OF AN AUDIENCE FOR A CHARACTER'S STAGE PERFORMANCE. WE ASK THAT YOU WEAR FORMAL ATTIRE (SUIT UIT/DRESS) WHAT'S PROVIDED: WHILST THIS IS AN UNPAID OPPORTUNITY, WE WILL PROVIDE FOOD AND FUNDS FOR BEVERAGES FROM THE NEIGHBOURING ARTS BAR Contact amulliganfilm@gmail.com or message me directly if youre interested:)'

items.title: Hi all,

items.text:
Hi everyone! My name is Emma and I am one of the producers for the upcoming short film The Story I Drew of Him. We are excited to be starting our casting process! 

Filming will take place in the greater Vancouver area, August 15-17th and August 22nd-23rd (tentatively).

If you are interested in being a part of this amazing project please email your headshot, demo reel, resume, and the name of the character you are auditioning for to thestoryidrewofhim@gmail.com by this Monday July 27th.

items.text:
On cherche des Chevrolet. Des Chevrolet récents. De vieux Chevrolet. De vrais Chevrolet. Des Chevrolet avec lesquels vous avez fait de la course. Des Chevrolet qui ont été retapés, ou que vous avez l’intention de retaper.

Pas le genre de véhicule qui est dans le stationnement d’un concessionnaire, mais le genre qui est stationné dans votre entrée, ou dans votre garage, ou qui n’est presque jamais stationné.

Bref, si vous avez un Chevrolet, que vous aimez votre Chevrolet, il pourrait être la vedette de notre prochain projet.

Compensation de 1 500 $ CA si votre véhicule est sélectionné et utilisé dans notre publicité.

Cette offre est ouverte aux citoyennes et citoyens du Canada ou aux personnes qui ont leur statut de résidence permanente au Canada.

Tous les frais de déplacement et d'hébergement requis pour les personnes habitant hors de la province seront pris en charge.

DATES IMPORTANTES

Audition via Zoom : 31 juillet

Tournage : Du 9 au 14 août 2026 dans la région du Grand Toronto

*** TOUTES LES CANDIDATURES DOIVENT ÊTRE ENVOYÉES AVANT LE 29 JUILLET À 9 H 00 (HE)

Veuillez utiliser le lien de soumission ci-dessous:
https://onveutmettrevotrechevroletenvedette.castingcrane.com/

**CASTING CALL – PAID, NON-UNION BRAND VIDEO**

Novel Productions is casting **two roles** for a small **30-second Brand Video**

**Shoot Location:** Burnaby, BC

**Shoot Date:** August 26, 2026 (3-4 hours, depending on role)

**Compensation:** Flat rate of $300

**ROLES:**

• **The Broker** — Age **25–35** | Male, ethnicity open

• **The Waitress** — Age **35–50** | Male, ethnicity open

**SUBMISSIONS:**

Please send **headshot, acting resume, and reel (if available)** to: **casting@novelproductions.ca**

**Subject line:**

*Novel Casting - Role Name - Your Name*

This is a non-union flat-rate project intended for digital usage.

Selected submissions will be contacted with sides and instructions for self-tape auditions.

We encourage submissions from actors of all backgrounds.

items.title: Bonjour tout le monde

items.text:
Recherche partenaire pour Auditions conservatoire Dijon bordeaux septembre
Bonjour tout le monde, je suis un jeune comédien amateur de 28 ans et je recherche un ou une partenaire pour m'aider à concourir pour le conservatoire de Dijon et le conservatoire de Bordeaux, début septembre.

Je présente la scène onclenrie tiré de la pièce Debris de Denis Kelly

Je suis à Bouguenais près de Nantes, et je recherche un ou une partenaire dans les alentours que ce soit À Angers, dans les alentours de Nantes ou autre part... Ect. 

Étant donné que je suis amateur, je ne pourrai pas vous rémunérer, je travaille la semaine et je n'ai pas les moyens de rémunérer à chaque répétition mon partenaire, cependant bien évidemment que les frais de déplacement pour le lieu de l'audition seront compris 

Si jamais tu es disponible, cet été le samedi et dimanche et que tu peux m'aider n'hésite pas à me contacter rapidement soit par Messenger, par mail, en m'appelant ou en m'envoyant un sms.

Téléphone et sms : 0652069457

Mail: alexandre.primakoffpro@gmail.com 

Messenger : Alexandre Primakoff 

En te souhaitant un bien bel été !

topComments.text: Salut j’suis comédien/acteur. Je px t’aider en visio stv (si jamais t’as pas mieux). Me rendre physiquement à Bdx ne me pose pas de pb.

items.text:
❤️Dzień dobry, chce przedstawić naszą ofertę usług krawieckich.
⭐️Zajmujemy się szyciem na zamówienie — wykonujemy różnego rodzaju ubrania, kostiumy oraz projekty indywidualne według potrzeb klienta. Oferujemy również poprawki i naprawy odzieży.

Dodatkowo specjalizujemy się w tworzeniu maskotek (mascotów) — zarówno dla firm, jak i klientów indywidualnych. Każde zamówienie realizujemy indywidualnie, z dbałością o jakość i szczegóły.

👉Jeśli są Państwo zainteresowani — zapraszam do wiadomości prywatnej.

Chętnie odpowiem na wszystkie pytania. Poniżej kilka moich prac.

✨Lights. Music. Magic. We’re casting K-Pop Demon Hunters tributes! ✨ 

Do you have the energy, stage presence and performance skills to bring a high impact K-Pop act to life? 

Since the launch of our K-Pop Demon Hunters tribute act - it has been a HUGE hit!!! From more intimate smaller parties, to large scale events and festivals…even beyond the UK! 💜 

Due to such high demand, we are now looking for more performers to join our K-Pop team… a high energy, professionally choreographed act performing across the UK and beyond. 

We are looking for performers who:
✨Are age 18+
✨Are able to authentically and respectfully represent the characters heritage
✨Are reliable, professional and committed 
✨Have great stage presence and energy 
✨Dancing and singing abilities are a bonus (but not essential as all training is provided)
✨A valid UK passport is required for any work beyond the UK 

About the roll:
✨Paid performance opportunities 
✨Competitive rates of pay
✨Full training provided 
✨Events include birthday parties, private events, on stage performances, festivals and much more 
✨High quality costumes provided 
✨Be part of a supportive team 

Must be UK based and able to travel

This is not just a character roll - it’s a high energy act making dreams come true 💖💫 

If this sounds like you, we would love to hear from you! 

To apply, please email:

Wishuponastareventsltd@gmail.com

Or message us directly on Facebook 

Wish Upon a Star Events

We can’t wait to hear from you! 💜

#Kpop #performing #Acting #Dancing #Singing #Makingmagicalmoments #wishuponastar #dreams #casting #castingcall #hiring #magical #events

🎬 PAID -ACTORS AGES 18–25

Hello everyone! 
Amega Studios is seeking male and female actors for  family-comedy YouTube project.

The project is produced by the team behind H2O a comedy YouTube channel with 2 million subscribers.

We’re looking for energetic, expressive, camera-friendly people who enjoy comedy, fun activities, and challenges. Acting experience is welcome but not required.

📍 Westlake Village, CA
🎭 Non-Union
💵 First-month introductory rate: $100 per filming day

To apply, please email castyoutube@gmail.com with:

• Your name, age, and current city
• Recent photos
• Instagram, TikTok, or acting reel, if available
• A short 1–2 minute video introducing yourself

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL- *****Whatever Happens***

We are casting the lead role of *Amrita* in Whatever Happens, a character driven comedy-drama exploring friendship, family, and identity.

**SYNOPSIS**

When her mother pressures her into an unwanted arranged marriage, Amrita makes an impulsive decision with her best friend Jonah: they will marry each other. They soon discover that their plan forces them to confront deeper questions about love, family, identity, and the future they truly want.

**ROLE: AMRITA**

Female | 20s (Playable Age: 20–25) l South Asian l

Amrita is a creative and intelligent young woman caught between the life she has built in Canada and the future her mother wants for her. Funny and confident on the outside, she carries a deeper uncertainty about the dreams and parts of herself she has left behind.

We're looking for an actor who can bring emotional honesty, warmth, and complexity to the role!

Hindi or Punjabi fluency is strongly encouraged.

**SHOOT DETAILS**

**Location:** Vancouver, BC
**Shoot Dates:** Approximately 4 days in late August 2026
**Production Type:** Non-Union Independent Short Film
**Production Company:** Metamorphosis Films
**Compensation:** Volunteer production. Meals, craft services, and screen credit with footage provided.

**CONTENT INFORMATION**

This film explores friendship, family, and identity. Scenes include emotional conversations, simulated drinking, cultural/family themes, and a brief non-romantic kiss between characters for comedic effect. 

No nudity or sexual content is involved. We are committed to maintaining a respectful, collaborative, and professional set environment.

**TO APPLY**

Please send your headshot, demo reel (if available) and resume

to: 

whateverhappensshortfilm@gmail.com

Please also include your current location and availability for late August 2026.

Selected actors will receive self-tape sides and further audition instructions.

**Submission Deadline:** August 10, 2026

Self-tapes accepted until the deadline. Callbacks TBD.

Come join us, create something meaningful, and have fun along the way!

items.text:
CASTING CALL – Child Models - Paid

I'm casting for a non-speaking product video featuring creative building toys
similar to LEGO-style construction sets. Non-union.

I'm looking for the following roles:
Role 1 - Female, Age 12–16, Caucasian
Role 2 - Male, Age 7–12, Caucasian

Ideal Candidates

- Outgoing, confident personalities who enjoy playing with toys
- Able to follow simple direction and stay engaged during filming
- Comfortable in front of the camera
- Previous modeling or acting experience is welcome, but not required

Project Details

- Non-speaking role
- Small-scale, two-person production team in a relaxed, low-stress environment
- Each child will likely be needed for 1–2 hours, though filming may extend up to 4
hours

Pay: $50 CAD/hour (3-hour minimum guaranteed) — Minimum booking of $150
CAD per child

A fun opportunity to earn some extra money, gain on-camera experience, and try something new during summer break!

Filming Schedule

Dates: TBD (sometime in within the next two weeks ideally) 
Location: Lower Mainland, BC (exact location TBD)

I'm currently building my talent roster and will work around everyone's availability when scheduling filming.

Usage
The finished videos will be published digitally across the client's Amazon listings, website,brand store, social media channels, and other online advertising platforms.

Important Note
Per my client's request and for confidentiality purposes, the finished videos cannot be used for personal portfolios or demo reels.

Parent/Guardian Requirement
A parent or legal guardian must remain on set for the duration of filming for all child participants.

Interested?
Please email the following to runestonepics@gmail.com:

- Child's name, age, and gender
- A few recent photos (phone photos are perfectly fine)
- General availability over the summer
- Any previous modeling or acting experience (optional)

Subject Line: Child Casting – (Age, Gender)
Example: Child Casting – 13, Female

Selected applicants will be contacted with additional project details, filming dates, and a model release form.

I look forward to hearing from you

topComments.text: Hi Krissy, I am checking if the child has to be full caucasian, or is half caucasian okay to submit?
When you say it cannot be used for portfolios or demo reels, does that mean a child could not include this on their acting resume?

items.text:
**CASTING CALL: FILMING SATURDAY, AUGUST 8TH IN VANCOUVER**

Fourthframe Media is casting for our YouTube social experiment series: unscripted episodes where real people debate, deceive, and compete for a cash prize.

If you've seen Jubilee on YouTube, you know the vibe. We're building something like that right here in Vancouver.

**We're shooting 5 episodes and need people for:**
1. ⚫⚪ **Black vs Non-black:** Six Black contestants enter the room with one person secretly hiding. Through conversation, assumptions, and social instincts, the group has to figure out who is not who they appear to be.
2. ❤️ **Strangers Swipe On Each Other IRL:** Singles swipe face to face instead of through a screen, then find out whether the match still hits when the chemistry is real.
3. 📸 **6 Models vs 1 Fake:** Six real models and one convincing fake walk in. Can you fake a portfolio and a pose? The group has to clock who's pretending before the fake survives to the end.
4. 💰 **Split or Steal:** Every round forces a choice: share the outcome, or cut someone out to improve your own position. Trust is expensive.
5. 👀 **Siblings or Dating?**: Pairs walk in, and contestants have to read the vibe: family bond or romantic chemistry? The more convincing the pair, the messier the guess.

**Details:**
Location 📍: Vancouver, BC
Date 📅: Saturday, August 8th, 2026

🎬 This is volunteer-based. Winners take home a cash prize.
🙋 No acting experience needed; just be yourself and bring energy.

Apply here: [https://www.fourthframemedia.com/casting](https://www.fourthframemedia.com/casting)

Follow us on YouTube/Instagram/TikTok to see our latest episodes.

Instagram: [https://www.instagram.com/4thframemedia](https://www.instagram.com/4thframemedia)

items.summary:
**CASTING CALL: FILMING SATURDAY, AUGUST 8TH IN VANCOUVER**

Fourthframe Media is casting for our YouTube social experiment series: unscripted episodes where real people debate, deceive, and compete for a cash prize.

If you've seen Jubilee on YouTube, you know the vibe. We're building something like that right here in Vancouver.

**We're shooting 5 episodes and need people for:**
1. ⚫⚪ **Black vs Non-black:** Six Black contestants enter the room with one person secretly hiding. Through conversation, assumptions, and social instincts, the group has to figure out who is not who they appear to be.
2. ❤️ **Strangers Swipe On Each Other IRL:** Singles swipe face to face instead of through a screen, then find out whether the match still hits when the chemistry is real.
3. 📸 **6 Models vs 1 Fake:** Six real models and one convincing fake walk in. Can you fake a portfolio and a pose? The group has to clock who's pretending before the fake survives to the end.
4. 💰 **Split or Steal:** Every round forces a choice: share the outcome, or cut someone out to improve your own position. Trust is expensive.
5. 👀 **Siblings or Dating?**: Pairs walk in, and contestants have to read the vibe: family bond or romantic chemistry? The more convincing the pair, the messier the guess.

**Details:**
Location 📍: Vancouver, BC
Date 📅: Saturday, August 8th, 2026

🎬 This is volunteer-based. Winners take home a cash prize.
🙋 No acting experience needed; just be yourself and bring energy.

Apply here: [https://www.fourthframemedia.com/casting](https://www.fourthframemedia.com/casting)

Follow us on YouTube/Instagram/TikTok to see our latest episodes.

Instagram: [https://www.instagram.com/4thframemedia](https://www.instagram.com/4thframemedia)
YouTube: [https://www.youtube.com/@4thframemedia](https://www.youtube.com/@4thframemedia)
TikTok: [https://www.tiktok.com/@4thframemedia2](https://www.tiktok.com/@4thframemedia2)

Know someone who'd be perfect? Tag them or share this post.

#vancouver #socialexperiment #4thFrameMedia #JubileeStyle #RealVsFake #jubilee
